name: Melamine
description: Melamine is a white, crystalline, nitrogen-rich compound used for producing thermosetting resins. It is insoluble in water but reacts with formaldehyde to form durable polymers.
physicalProperties: Melamine is a white, crystalline, nitrogen-rich compound used for producing thermosetting resins. It is insoluble in water but reacts with formaldehyde to form durable polymers.
safetyHandling: Toxic if ingested; avoid dust inhalation and use in food-contact materials only under regulatory compliance.
tradeRegulatory: Delivered in 25 kg woven polypropylene bags or 1,000 kg bulk sacks. Store in a cool, dry, well-ventilated area.

name: Methyl Alcohol
description: Methyl alcohol (methanol) is a clear, volatile, and flammable liquid with mild odor. It is completely miscible with water, alcohols, and many organic solvents.
physicalProperties: Methyl alcohol (methanol) is a clear, volatile, and flammable liquid with mild odor. It is completely miscible with water, alcohols, and many organic solvents.
safetyHandling: Highly flammable and toxic by ingestion, inhalation, or skin absorption. Ensure proper ventilation and flame-proof handling.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 200 L steel drums or 1,000 L IBC tanks. Store cool, dry, and away from ignition sources.

name: Methyl Ethyl Ketone
description: Methyl ethyl ketone (MEK) is a colorless, volatile liquid with a sharp, sweet odor. It has excellent solvent power, fast evaporation rate, and high miscibility with organic compounds.
physicalProperties: Methyl ethyl ketone (MEK) is a colorless, volatile liquid with a sharp, sweet odor. It has excellent solvent power, fast evaporation rate, and high miscibility with organic compounds.
safetyHandling: Highly flammable; vapors may form explosive mixtures with air. Use in well-ventilated, explosion-proof areas.
tradeRegulatory: Delivered in 165–200 L steel drums or 1,000 L IBC tanks. Store in cool, dry, and tightly closed containers away from direct sunlight and oxidizers.

name: Methyl Formate
description: Methyl formate is a colorless, volatile liquid with a pleasant ether-like odor. It is an ester formed from methanol and formic acid, notable for its high vapor pressure and rapid evaporation rate.
physicalProperties: Methyl formate is a colorless, volatile liquid with a pleasant ether-like odor. It is an ester formed from methanol and formic acid, notable for its high vapor pressure and rapid evaporation rate.
safetyHandling: Highly flammable and mildly toxic by inhalation; avoid ignition sources and ensure adequate ventilation.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 180–200 L steel drums or 1,000 L IBC tanks. Store cool, dry, and tightly sealed away from acids and oxidizers.

name: Methyl Isobutyl Carbinol
description: Methyl isobutyl carbinol is a clear, colorless liquid with a mild odor, known for its moderate volatility and chemical stability.
physicalProperties: Methyl isobutyl carbinol is a clear, colorless liquid with a mild odor, known for its moderate volatility and chemical stability.
safetyHandling: Flammable liquid and vapor; inhalation may cause mild irritation. Use explosion-proof equipment and proper ventilation.
tradeRegulatory: Delivered in 180 kg drums or IBC tanks. Store cool, dry, and sealed away from direct sunlight.

name: Methyl Cellulose
description: Methyl cellulose is a white, odorless, water-soluble polymer derived from cellulose etherification. It forms stable gels and viscous solutions upon hydration.
physicalProperties: Methyl cellulose is a white, odorless, water-soluble polymer derived from cellulose etherification. It forms stable gels and viscous solutions upon hydration.
safetyHandling: Non-toxic and biodegradable. Avoid dust formation and excessive moisture.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 25 kg multiwall paper bags or fiber drums. Store cool, dry, and tightly sealed.

name: Methylamine
description: Methylamine is a colorless, flammable gas with an ammonia-like odor, usually supplied in aqueous or anhydrous form. It is a primary amine and a key building block in chemical manufacturing.
physicalProperties: Methylamine is a colorless, flammable gas with an ammonia-like odor, usually supplied in aqueous or anhydrous form. It is a primary amine and a key building block in chemical manufacturing.
safetyHandling: Toxic and corrosive; causes burns and irritation. Handle under fume hood with full PPE.
tradeRegulatory: Delivered in pressurized steel cylinders or ISO tanks. Store in cool, ventilated areas away from oxidizers.

name: Methyldiethanolamine
description: Methyldiethanolamine is a colorless, hygroscopic liquid amine with low volatility and high chemical stability. It is partially miscible with water and alcohols.
physicalProperties: Methyldiethanolamine is a colorless, hygroscopic liquid amine with low volatility and high chemical stability. It is partially miscible with water and alcohols.
safetyHandling: Corrosive and irritant; avoid inhalation and prolonged skin contact.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 200 kg HDPE drums or IBC tanks. Store in cool, dry, and sealed conditions.

name: Methylene Chloride
description: Methylene chloride, or dichloromethane, is a colorless, volatile solvent with mild sweet odor and high solvency power. It has moderate volatility and good stability.
physicalProperties: Methylene chloride, or dichloromethane, is a colorless, volatile solvent with mild sweet odor and high solvency power. It has moderate volatility and good stability.
safetyHandling: Toxic by inhalation; suspected carcinogen. Ensure closed systems and effective ventilation.
tradeRegulatory: Delivered in 250 kg drums or 1,000 L IBC tanks. Store in cool, dry, well-ventilated areas.

name: Methimazole
description: Methimazole is a white crystalline heterocyclic compound belonging to thioimidazole derivatives. It acts as an antithyroid agent by inhibiting thyroid peroxidase.
physicalProperties: Methimazole is a white crystalline heterocyclic compound belonging to thioimidazole derivatives. It acts as an antithyroid agent by inhibiting thyroid peroxidase.
safetyHandling: Toxic in overdose; may cause skin sensitization. Use gloves and controlled environments.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 1–25 kg aluminum foil bags or glass bottles. Store cool, dry, and dark.

name: Methionine
description: Methionine is an essential sulfur-containing amino acid found in proteins. It appears as a white crystalline powder with slight odor.
physicalProperties: Methionine is an essential sulfur-containing amino acid found in proteins. It appears as a white crystalline powder with slight odor.
safetyHandling: Non-toxic and stable; protect from humidity to maintain quality.
tradeRegulatory: Delivered in 25 kg PE-lined paper bags or drums. Store cool, dry, and sealed.

name: Microcrystalline Cellulose
description: Microcrystalline cellulose is a purified, partially depolymerized cellulose obtained from wood pulp. It is a white, odorless powder with compressibility and binding properties.
physicalProperties: Microcrystalline cellulose is a purified, partially depolymerized cellulose obtained from wood pulp. It is a white, odorless powder with compressibility and binding properties.
safetyHandling: Non-toxic and inert; handle under dry, ventilated conditions.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 25 kg multiwall paper bags or fiber drums. Store cool, dry, and tightly sealed.

name: Molybdenum Disulfide
description: Molybdenum disulfide is a black-gray crystalline compound with a lamellar structure and metallic luster. It is insoluble in water and chemically inert.
physicalProperties: Molybdenum disulfide is a black-gray crystalline compound with a lamellar structure and metallic luster. It is insoluble in water and chemically inert.
safetyHandling: Stable and non-toxic; avoid generating airborne dust.
tradeRegulatory: Delivered in 25 kg fiber drums or PE-lined bags. Store in cool, dry, and clean conditions.

name: Mono Ethanolamine
description: Monoethanolamine is a colorless, viscous liquid with a mild ammonia-like odor. It is an organic compound containing both amine and alcohol functional groups, offering strong alkalinity and reactivity.
physicalProperties: Monoethanolamine is a colorless, viscous liquid with a mild ammonia-like odor. It is an organic compound containing both amine and alcohol functional groups, offering strong alkalinity and reactivity.
safetyHandling: Corrosive and irritant; may cause burns to skin and eyes. Avoid contact with strong oxidizers and acids.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 200 kg HDPE drums or 1,000 L IBC tanks. Store in a cool, dry, and well-ventilated area.

name: Mono Ethylene Glycol
description: Monoethylene glycol is a colorless, odorless, and hygroscopic liquid with sweet taste. It is completely miscible with water, alcohols, and many organic solvents.
physicalProperties: Monoethylene glycol is a colorless, odorless, and hygroscopic liquid with sweet taste. It is completely miscible with water, alcohols, and many organic solvents.
safetyHandling: Toxic if ingested; avoid contact with food-related materials. Store in corrosion-resistant containers.
tradeRegulatory: Delivered in 230 kg steel drums or 1,000 L IBC tanks. Store cool, dry, and tightly sealed.

name: Mono Potassium Phosphate
description: Monopotassium phosphate is a white crystalline powder that is highly soluble in water and provides a balanced source of phosphorus and potassium.
physicalProperties: Monopotassium phosphate is a white crystalline powder that is highly soluble in water and provides a balanced source of phosphorus and potassium.
safetyHandling: Non-toxic but mildly irritating to skin and eyes. Avoid mixing with strong acids.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 25 kg polypropylene bags or bulk sacks. Store cool, dry, and sealed.

name: Mono Propylene Glycol (MPG)
description: Monopropylene glycol is a clear, viscous, hygroscopic liquid with low volatility. It is odorless and miscible with water and alcohols.
physicalProperties: Monopropylene glycol is a clear, viscous, hygroscopic liquid with low volatility. It is odorless and miscible with water and alcohols.
safetyHandling: Low toxicity and non-corrosive. Avoid long-term exposure to heat and air to prevent oxidation.
tradeRegulatory: Delivered in 215 kg drums or IBC tanks. Store cool, dry, and sealed.

name: Monoammonium Phosphate
description: Monoammonium phosphate is a white crystalline inorganic salt produced from ammonia and phosphoric acid. It is highly soluble in water and non-hygroscopic.
physicalProperties: Monoammonium phosphate is a white crystalline inorganic salt produced from ammonia and phosphoric acid. It is highly soluble in water and non-hygroscopic.
safetyHandling: Stable and non-toxic; avoid exposure to moisture and high heat.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 25 kg plastic-lined woven bags or 1,000 kg big bags. Store cool, dry, and tightly sealed.

name: Monochloroacetic Acid
description: Monochloroacetic acid is a colorless to white crystalline solid with strong acidity and high reactivity. It is a halogenated derivative of acetic acid.
physicalProperties: Monochloroacetic acid is a colorless to white crystalline solid with strong acidity and high reactivity. It is a halogenated derivative of acetic acid.
safetyHandling: Highly corrosive and toxic; contact causes severe burns. Handle with PPE in controlled environments.
tradeRegulatory: Delivered in 25 kg HDPE drums or 1,000 kg IBCs. Store in a cool, dry, and ventilated area away from bases.

name: Monosodium Phosphate
otherNames: MSP, Monobasic Sodium Phosphate, Sodium Dihydrogen Phosphate
description: Monosodium phosphate is a white crystalline powder with mild acidity and high solubility. It functions as a buffering and sequestering agent.
physicalProperties: Monosodium phosphate is a white crystalline powder with mild acidity and high solubility. It functions as a buffering and sequestering agent.
safetyHandling: Non-toxic but may irritate skin or eyes; avoid dust inhalation.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 25 kg PE-lined paper bags or bulk sacks. Store cool, dry, and sealed.

name: Monosodium Glutamate
description: Monosodium glutamate (MSG) is the sodium salt of glutamic acid, appearing as a white crystalline powder with umami taste.
physicalProperties: Monosodium glutamate (MSG) is the sodium salt of glutamic acid, appearing as a white crystalline powder with umami taste.
safetyHandling: Recognized as safe (GRAS) at regulated levels. Store away from humidity to prevent caking.
tradeRegulatory: Delivered in 25 kg PE-lined paper bags. Store in a cool, dry, and sealed location.

name: Morpholine
description: Morpholine is a colorless, hygroscopic liquid with a characteristic amine odor. It exhibits both basic and solvent properties due to its cyclic amine-ether structure.
physicalProperties: Morpholine is a colorless, hygroscopic liquid with a characteristic amine odor. It exhibits both basic and solvent properties due to its cyclic amine-ether structure.
safetyHandling: Corrosive and toxic in concentrated form. Use gloves, goggles, and ventilation during handling.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 200 kg steel drums or IBC tanks. Store cool, dry, and sealed tightly.

name: Muscenone
description: Muscenone is a macrocyclic musk compound with a clean, sweet, and long-lasting odor profile. It appears as a colorless to pale-yellow liquid with high stability.
physicalProperties: Muscenone is a macrocyclic musk compound with a clean, sweet, and long-lasting odor profile. It appears as a colorless to pale-yellow liquid with high stability.
safetyHandling: Non-toxic and non-irritating under normal use. Avoid prolonged exposure to light and heat.
tradeRegulatory: Delivered in 5–25 kg aluminum containers or HDPE drums. Store in cool, dry, and dark conditions.

name: Propylene Carbonate
description: Propylene carbonate is a colorless, odorless, high-boiling organic solvent with excellent solvency and dielectric strength.
physicalProperties: Propylene carbonate is a colorless, odorless, high-boiling organic solvent with excellent solvency and dielectric strength.
safetyHandling: Low toxicity and biodegradable; avoid prolonged moisture exposure.
tradeRegulatory: Delivered in 200 kg steel drums or IBC tanks. Store cool, dry, and tightly closed.

name: Ethylene Carbonate
description: Ethylene carbonate (C₃H₄O₃) is a high-boiling, polar solvent with excellent dielectric properties. It appears as a colorless, odorless crystalline solid at room temperature.
physicalProperties: Ethylene carbonate (C₃H₄O₃) is a high-boiling, polar solvent with excellent dielectric properties. It appears as a colorless, odorless crystalline solid at room temperature.
safetyHandling: Low volatility but may cause mild irritation. Avoid high heat and strong oxidizers.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 25 kg bags or 200 kg drums. Store sealed, cool, and dry, away from light.

name: Ethylenediamine
description: Ethylenediamine (C₂H₈N₂) is a colorless, alkaline liquid with an ammonia-like odor. It contains two primary amine groups, making it highly reactive in chemical synthesis.
physicalProperties: Ethylenediamine (C₂H₈N₂) is a colorless, alkaline liquid with an ammonia-like odor. It contains two primary amine groups, making it highly reactive in chemical synthesis.
safetyHandling: Corrosive; causes burns and respiratory irritation. Avoid contact with acids and CO₂.
tradeRegulatory: Delivered in 200 kg drums or IBC tanks. Store sealed, cool, and in ventilated conditions away from oxidants.

name: Ferrovanadium
description: Ferrovanadium (FeV) is an iron–vanadium alloy typically containing 35–85% vanadium. It appears as gray metallic granules with high strength and hardness properties.
physicalProperties: Ferrovanadium (FeV) is an iron–vanadium alloy typically containing 35–85% vanadium. It appears as gray metallic granules with high strength and hardness properties.
safetyHandling: Non-toxic but dust inhalation should be avoided. Handle with gloves and use dust suppression measures.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 1-ton big bags or steel drums. Store in dry conditions away from oxidizers and acids.

name: Propionic Acid
otherNames: Ethylformic Acid, Methylacetic Acid, Propanoic Acid
description: Propionic acid is a colorless liquid with pungent odor and strong antimicrobial properties. It is miscible with water and alcohol.
physicalProperties: Propionic acid is a colorless liquid with pungent odor and strong antimicrobial properties. It is miscible with water and alcohol.
safetyHandling: Corrosive; avoid contact with skin and eyes. Handle in ventilated areas.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 200 kg HDPE drums or IBC tanks. Store in a cool, dry, and sealed environment.

name: Fluorosilicic Acid
description: Fluorosilicic acid is a colorless, corrosive liquid formed as a byproduct of phosphate fertilizer production. It is a strong fluorinating agent with industrial and municipal applications.
physicalProperties: Fluorosilicic acid is a colorless, corrosive liquid formed as a byproduct of phosphate fertilizer production. It is a strong fluorinating agent with industrial and municipal applications.
safetyHandling: Highly corrosive and toxic by ingestion or inhalation. Use acid-resistant PPE and local ventilation.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 25–35 kg PE drums or 1,000 L IBC tanks. Store in acid-resistant containers away from bases.

name: Vitamin B9 Folic Acid
description: Folic acid is a kind of B-vitamin which is mainly present in the liver and kidney. It has various kinds of pharmacological and physiological. It is a nutritional factor found in milk, eggs, malted barley, liver, kidney, heart, and leafy vegetables, but the richest natural source is yeast.
physicalProperties: Folic acid is a kind of B-vitamin which is mainly present in the liver and kidney. It has various kinds of pharmacological and physiological. It is a nutritional factor found in milk, eggs, malted barley, liver, kidney, heart, and leafy vegetables, but the richest natural source is yeast.
safetyHandling: Low toxicity, GRAS; may mask B12 deficiency; use PPE for dust; stable under normal conditions.
tradeRegulatory: Store tightly closed in dry areas; dispose per regulations.

name: N-Methyl-2-Pyrrolidone
description: N-Methyl-2-pyrrolidone is a colorless, high-boiling, polar aprotic solvent with excellent solvency and thermal stability. It is miscible with water and most organic solvents.
physicalProperties: N-Methyl-2-pyrrolidone is a colorless, high-boiling, polar aprotic solvent with excellent solvency and thermal stability. It is miscible with water and most organic solvents.
safetyHandling: Absorbed through skin; may cause irritation. Handle under ventilation and wear protective gloves.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 200 kg steel drums or 1,000 L IBC tanks. Store in cool, dry, and well-ventilated conditions.

name: Naphthalene Sulfonate
description: Naphthalene sulfonate is a brown to dark powder derived from sulfonation of naphthalene, forming sodium salts. It has excellent dispersing and wetting properties.
physicalProperties: Naphthalene sulfonate is a brown to dark powder derived from sulfonation of naphthalene, forming sodium salts. It has excellent dispersing and wetting properties.
safetyHandling: Low toxicity; avoid inhalation of dust and long-term exposure.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 25 kg woven bags or 1,000 kg bulk sacks. Store in a dry, ventilated environment.

name: Neodecanoic Acid
description: Neodecanoic acid is a clear to pale-yellow branched carboxylic acid with low volatility and high stability. It has excellent corrosion resistance properties.
physicalProperties: Neodecanoic acid is a clear to pale-yellow branched carboxylic acid with low volatility and high stability. It has excellent corrosion resistance properties.
safetyHandling: Low toxicity and mild irritant; handle with gloves and avoid prolonged skin contact.
tradeRegulatory: Delivered in 180 kg drums or IBC tanks. Store in cool, dry, and sealed containers.

name: Neohesperidin Dihydrochalcone
description: Neohesperidin dihydrochalcone (NHDC) is a white crystalline compound derived from citrus flavonoids through hydrogenation. It is intensely sweet—approximately 1,500 times sweeter than sucrose.
physicalProperties: Neohesperidin dihydrochalcone (NHDC) is a white crystalline compound derived from citrus flavonoids through hydrogenation. It is intensely sweet—approximately 1,500 times sweeter than sucrose.
safetyHandling: Non-toxic and heat-stable; avoid exposure to light and moisture.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 1–25 kg aluminum foil bags or fiber drums. Store cool, dry, and sealed.

name: Neroli Oil
description: Neroli oil is a pale-yellow essential oil distilled from bitter orange blossoms. It has a floral, citrus aroma and high content of linalool and nerolidol.
physicalProperties: Neroli oil is a pale-yellow essential oil distilled from bitter orange blossoms. It has a floral, citrus aroma and high content of linalool and nerolidol.
safetyHandling: Non-toxic and non-irritating at normal use levels; store away from light and heat.
tradeRegulatory: Delivered in 1–5 kg aluminum bottles or 25 kg drums. Store in a cool, dry, and dark place.

name: Nickel Chloride
description: Nickel chloride hexahydrate is a green crystalline compound highly soluble in water and ethanol. It forms a key nickel source for plating and catalysis.
physicalProperties: Nickel chloride hexahydrate is a green crystalline compound highly soluble in water and ethanol. It forms a key nickel source for plating and catalysis.
safetyHandling: Toxic and carcinogenic; avoid inhalation or skin contact. Handle under fume extraction with PPE.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 25 kg plastic-lined fiber drums. Store cool, dry, and tightly closed.

name: Nickel Sulfate
description: Nickel sulfate hexahydrate is a blue-green crystalline solid soluble in water. It serves as a primary nickel source in electrochemical and metallurgical processes.
physicalProperties: Nickel sulfate hexahydrate is a blue-green crystalline solid soluble in water. It serves as a primary nickel source in electrochemical and metallurgical processes.
safetyHandling: Toxic upon prolonged exposure; handle with gloves and respiratory protection.
tradeRegulatory: Delivered in 25 kg polyethylene-lined bags or drums. Store in cool, dry, and sealed areas.

name: Nicotinamide Riboside Chloride
description: Nicotinamide riboside chloride is a white crystalline powder acting as a direct precursor to NAD⁺. It supports mitochondrial function and cellular energy metabolism.
physicalProperties: Nicotinamide riboside chloride is a white crystalline powder acting as a direct precursor to NAD⁺. It supports mitochondrial function and cellular energy metabolism.
safetyHandling: Non-toxic and well-tolerated; store in low-humidity, light-protected conditions.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 1–25 kg aluminum foil bags or fiber drums. Store cool, dry, and tightly sealed.

name: Nitric Acid
description: Nitric acid is a colorless to yellowish liquid with strong corrosive and oxidizing properties. It fumes in air and reacts violently with most organic materials.
physicalProperties: Nitric acid is a colorless to yellowish liquid with strong corrosive and oxidizing properties. It fumes in air and reacts violently with most organic materials.
safetyHandling: Highly corrosive and oxidizing; causes severe burns and emits toxic vapors. Handle with acid-resistant PPE and proper ventilation.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 35–68% concentrations in 35 kg or 1,000 L acid-resistant containers. Store in a cool, well-ventilated, corrosion-proof area away from organics.

name: Oxalic Acid
description: Oxalic acid dihydrate is a white crystalline organic acid that is soluble in water and alcohol. It acts as a reducing and chelating agent with strong acidity.
physicalProperties: Oxalic acid dihydrate is a white crystalline organic acid that is soluble in water and alcohol. It acts as a reducing and chelating agent with strong acidity.
safetyHandling: Toxic if ingested; corrosive to skin and eyes. Handle with gloves and avoid inhalation.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 25 kg paper or polyethylene bags. Store in a cool, dry, and well-ventilated area away from oxidizers.

name: Oleic Acid
description: Oleic acid is a clear to pale-yellow monounsaturated fatty acid derived from vegetable oils or animal fats. It is insoluble in water but miscible with alcohols and hydrocarbons.
physicalProperties: Oleic acid is a clear to pale-yellow monounsaturated fatty acid derived from vegetable oils or animal fats. It is insoluble in water but miscible with alcohols and hydrocarbons.
safetyHandling: Non-toxic and biodegradable; avoid prolonged air exposure to prevent oxidation.
tradeRegulatory: Delivered in 180 kg drums or IBC tanks. Store cool, sealed, and protected from light.

name: P-Toluenesulfonic Acid
description: p-Toluenesulfonic acid (PTSA) is a white crystalline organic acid with strong acidity and good solubility in polar solvents.
physicalProperties: p-Toluenesulfonic acid (PTSA) is a white crystalline organic acid with strong acidity and good solubility in polar solvents.
safetyHandling: Corrosive and irritant; handle with gloves and avoid inhalation.
tradeRegulatory: Delivered in 25 kg bags or 200 kg drums. Store dry, cool, and tightly sealed.

name: Paraffin
description: Paraffin is a colorless to white waxy solid composed mainly of saturated hydrocarbons. It is odorless, tasteless, and chemically stable.
physicalProperties: Paraffin is a colorless to white waxy solid composed mainly of saturated hydrocarbons. It is odorless, tasteless, and chemically stable.
safetyHandling: Non-toxic and non-reactive; flammable when heated above flash point.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 25 kg slabs or 180 kg drums. Store in a cool, dry, and ventilated area away from open flames.

name: Formamide
description: Formamide is a colorless, hygroscopic liquid with high polarity and solvency. It is a key reagent in organic synthesis and biochemical reactions.
physicalProperties: Formamide is a colorless, hygroscopic liquid with high polarity and solvency. It is a key reagent in organic synthesis and biochemical reactions.
safetyHandling: Toxic by skin absorption and inhalation; suspected teratogen. Handle in closed systems with gloves and ventilation.
tradeRegulatory: Delivered in 200 kg steel drums or IBC tanks. Store in cool, dry areas away from heat and oxidants.

name: Formic Acid
description: Formic acid is a colorless, fuming liquid with a pungent odor and strong acidity. It is the simplest carboxylic acid and occurs naturally in ants and plants.
physicalProperties: Formic acid is a colorless, fuming liquid with a pungent odor and strong acidity. It is the simplest carboxylic acid and occurs naturally in ants and plants.
safetyHandling: Corrosive and volatile; contact may cause severe burns. Vapors can irritate respiratory tract. Handle under fume extraction with acid-resistant PPE.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 25–250 kg HDPE drums or IBC tanks. Store cool, dry, and away from oxidizing agents and bases.

name: Phosphonic Acid
description: Phosphonic acid is a white crystalline solid or syrupy liquid with strong reducing and chelating properties. It is a diprotic acid used primarily as a stabilizer and corrosion inhibitor.
physicalProperties: Phosphonic acid is a white crystalline solid or syrupy liquid with strong reducing and chelating properties. It is a diprotic acid used primarily as a stabilizer and corrosion inhibitor.
safetyHandling: Corrosive; may cause burns upon contact. Avoid heating above decomposition point to prevent phosphine gas release.
tradeRegulatory: Delivered in 25 kg bags (solid) or 200 kg drums (liquid). Store sealed, dry, and in corrosion-resistant containers.

name: Phosphoric Acid
description: Phosphoric acid is a colorless, odorless viscous liquid or crystalline solid. It is one of the most important inorganic acids with applications across multiple industries.
physicalProperties: Phosphoric acid is a colorless, odorless viscous liquid or crystalline solid. It is one of the most important inorganic acids with applications across multiple industries.
safetyHandling: Corrosive to skin and eyes; avoid inhalation of mist. Use with acid-resistant equipment and gloves.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 35 kg cans, 250 kg drums, or IBC tanks. Store cool, dry, and away from alkalis.

name: Fumaric Acid
description: Fumaric acid is a white crystalline dicarboxylic acid with low solubility and strong acidifying capability. It occurs naturally in many plants and fungi.
physicalProperties: Fumaric acid is a white crystalline dicarboxylic acid with low solubility and strong acidifying capability. It occurs naturally in many plants and fungi.
safetyHandling: Low toxicity; may cause irritation in dust form. Avoid direct contact and store in dry environments.
tradeRegulatory: Delivered in 25 kg bags or fiber drums. Store sealed, cool, and protected from moisture.

name: Glycolic Acid
description: Glycolic acid is the smallest alpha hydroxy acid (AHA) with high solubility and reactivity. It is a colorless crystalline solid or viscous liquid with strong exfoliating properties.
physicalProperties: Glycolic acid is the smallest alpha hydroxy acid (AHA) with high solubility and reactivity. It is a colorless crystalline solid or viscous liquid with strong exfoliating properties.
safetyHandling: Corrosive at high concentrations; causes skin and eye irritation. Use protective gloves and goggles.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 25–250 kg HDPE drums or IBC tanks. Store cool, dry, and tightly sealed.

name: Glyceryl Monostearate
description: Glyceryl monostearate (C₂₁H₄₂O₄) is a monoester of glycerol and stearic acid. It appears as a white waxy solid functioning as an emulsifier and lubricant.
physicalProperties: Glyceryl monostearate (C₂₁H₄₂O₄) is a monoester of glycerol and stearic acid. It appears as a white waxy solid functioning as an emulsifier and lubricant.
safetyHandling: Non-toxic and biodegradable. Store away from direct heat and moisture to prevent oxidation.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 25 kg paper bags or cartons. Store cool, dry, and sealed.

name: Riboflavin
description: Riboflavin, Vitamin B2, is a water-soluble isoalloxazine derivative, yellow crystalline powder with slight solubility (0.066 g/L at 20°C), functioning as a precursor to FMN and FAD coenzymes in redox metabolism, produced via fermentation or synthesis per PubChem nutritional data.
physicalProperties: Riboflavin, Vitamin B2, is a water-soluble isoalloxazine derivative, yellow crystalline powder with slight solubility (0.066 g/L at 20°C), functioning as a precursor to FMN and FAD coenzymes in redox metabolism, produced via fermentation or synthesis per PubChem nutritional data.
safetyHandling: Non-toxic with high doses causing harmless urine fluorescence; photosensitive leading to degradation. Avoid UV exposure in storage; use shaded handling areas and dust extractors to minimize airborne particles per safety assessments.
tradeRegulatory: Sealed in 10 kg light-barrier aluminum cans with nitrogen purges. Keep in vitamin-specific cool rooms with inventory scanning for expiration tracking.

name: Rutin
description: Rutin, quercetin-3-rutinoside, is a citrus flavonoid glycoside as a yellow needle-like crystal, sparingly soluble in water but enhanced in hot solvents, exhibiting P-vitamin activity for vascular permeability reduction and antioxidant effects, sourced from buckwheat per Sigma-Aldrich botanicals.
physicalProperties: Rutin, quercetin-3-rutinoside, is a citrus flavonoid glycoside as a yellow needle-like crystal, sparingly soluble in water but enhanced in hot solvents, exhibiting P-vitamin activity for vascular permeability reduction and antioxidant effects, sourced from buckwheat per Sigma-Aldrich botanicals.
safetyHandling: Safe with occasional GI upset; potentiates anticoagulants. Low absorption requires formulation aids; patch test for topical uses and monitor for flavone sensitivities in batch releases.
tradeRegulatory: Packaged in 15 kg vacuum-sealed foil laminates within fiber boxes. Store in dehumidified botanical warehouses with UV filters.

name: Salicylic Acid
description: Salicylic Acid, 2-hydroxybenzoic acid, is orthorhombic white crystals from willow bark or synthesized, soluble in acetone with keratolytic action at 1-2% concentrations, pKa 2.97 for topical penetration per ChemSpider pharmacokinetics.
physicalProperties: Salicylic Acid, 2-hydroxybenzoic acid, is orthorhombic white crystals from willow bark or synthesized, soluble in acetone with keratolytic action at 1-2% concentrations, pKa 2.97 for topical penetration per ChemSpider pharmacokinetics.
safetyHandling: Salicylism toxicity with tinnitus; corrosive undiluted. Reproductive warnings; neutralize with bases and wear vapor masks for heated applications per GHS.
tradeRegulatory: Contained in 20 kg phenolic-resin coated drums. Store in salicylic-dedicated acid rooms.

name: Sebacic Acid
description: Sebacic Acid, decanedioic acid, is a white flaky dicarboxylic solid from castor oil hydrolysis, melting at 134°C and soluble in ethers, used for nylon 6,10 synthesis with chain-length specificity per Brenntag dicarboxylics.
physicalProperties: Sebacic Acid, decanedioic acid, is a white flaky dicarboxylic solid from castor oil hydrolysis, melting at 134°C and soluble in ethers, used for nylon 6,10 synthesis with chain-length specificity per Brenntag dicarboxylics.
safetyHandling: Mild eye irritant; low volatility but combustible. Dust deflagration potential; ground equipment and use of non-sparking tools in processing plants.
tradeRegulatory: Bagged in 25 kg net woven bags with PE inserts. Keep in general acid storage bays.

name: Selenium Dioxide
description: Selenium Dioxide, SeO2, is a white tetragonal crystalline subliming at 315°C, water-soluble forming selenious acid, oxidizer for allylic hydroxylation in fine chemicals per PubChem reaction mechanisms.
physicalProperties: Selenium Dioxide, SeO2, is a white tetragonal crystalline subliming at 315°C, water-soluble forming selenious acid, oxidizer for allylic hydroxylation in fine chemicals per PubChem reaction mechanisms.
safetyHandling: Acute toxicity with garlic breath symptom; chronic selenosis. Fume cabinets are obligatory; monitor air levels and provide selenium antidotes in kits.
tradeRegulatory: Sealed in 10 kg glass-lined steel cans. Lock in selenium hazard vaults.

name: Synthetic Cryolite
description: Synthetic Cryolite, Na3AlF6, is a white monoclinic powder synthesized from hydrofluoric acid and soda, slightly soluble with fluxing at 1000°C for alumina dissolution in Hall-Héroult process per Sigma-Aldrich inorganics.
physicalProperties: Synthetic Cryolite, Na3AlF6, is a white monoclinic powder synthesized from hydrofluoric acid and soda, slightly soluble with fluxing at 1000°C for alumina dissolution in Hall-Héroult process per Sigma-Aldrich inorganics.
safetyHandling: Fluoride ions release toxic skeletal fluorosis chronic. Aquatic persistent; use HF-resistant PPE and calcium gluconate for exposures.
tradeRegulatory: Packaged in 50 kg fiber-reinforced plastic barrels. Store in fluoride-safe dry zones.

name: Cetrimide
description: Cetrimide, cetrimonium bromide, is a quaternary ammonium white hygroscopic powder, highly soluble with cationic surfactant action for membrane disruption in antiseptics, 0.1-1% effective concentrations per ChemicalBook disinfectants.
physicalProperties: Cetrimide, cetrimonium bromide, is a quaternary ammonium white hygroscopic powder, highly soluble with cationic surfactant action for membrane disruption in antiseptics, 0.1-1% effective concentrations per ChemicalBook disinfectants.
safetyHandling: Corneal damage risk; ingestion neurotoxic. Biocidal resistance concerns; dilute accurately and use quaternary-compatible gloves.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 15 kg cardboard drums with plastic liners. Keep in surfactant storage with static control.

name: Silica Gel
description: Silica Gel, hydrated silicon dioxide, is amorphous porous granules or beads, insoluble but hygroscopic with 800 m²/g surface area for adsorption, indicator types change color at 5-20% RH per PubChem desiccants.
physicalProperties: Silica Gel, hydrated silicon dioxide, is amorphous porous granules or beads, insoluble but hygroscopic with 800 m²/g surface area for adsorption, indicator types change color at 5-20% RH per PubChem desiccants.
safetyHandling: Silicosis from chronic dust; eye abrasive. Non-toxic ingestion; use HEPA filters and moisten for dust suppression in bulk.
tradeRegulatory: Bagged in 25 kg permeable tyvek sacks. Store in desiccant handling areas with RH monitors.

name: Silicone Oil
description: Silicone oil is a versatile, high-performance fluid offering excellent thermal stability, lubricity, and inertness. It is available in a broad range of viscosities to support diverse industrial, cosmetic, and technical applications where long-term stability and purity are essential.
physicalProperties: Silicone oil is a versatile, high-performance fluid offering excellent thermal stability, lubricity, and inertness. It is available in a broad range of viscosities to support diverse industrial, cosmetic, and technical applications where long-term stability and purity are essential.
safetyHandling: Low toxicity and generally safe to handle. May cause slight irritation with direct contact. Combustible at high temperatures; avoid contamination with strong oxidisers. Follow PPE guidelines for high-viscosity handling.
tradeRegulatory: Delivered in 1 kg bottles, 25 kg pails, or 200 kg drums. Store sealed in clean, dry warehouses and refer to SDS for handling recommendations.

name: Citric Acid
description: Citric Acid is a weak organic acid with formula C6H8O7, appearing as colorless crystals or white powder, highly soluble in water and produced by fermentation of carbohydrates using Aspergillus niger. It acts as a pH regulator, chelating agent, and flavor enhancer in various industries, with high purity grades available for food and pharmaceutical use as per PubChem compound details and Brenntag sourcing standards.
physicalProperties: Citric Acid is a weak organic acid with formula C6H8O7, appearing as colorless crystals or white powder, highly soluble in water and produced by fermentation of carbohydrates using Aspergillus niger. It acts as a pH regulator, chelating agent, and flavor enhancer in various industries, with high purity grades available for food and pharmaceutical use as per PubChem compound details and Brenntag sourcing standards.
safetyHandling: Can cause eye and skin irritation in concentrated form; dust inhalation may lead to respiratory issues. Low acute toxicity but prolonged exposure risks sensitization; avoid mixing with strong oxidizers to prevent reactions; handle with gloves and ventilation per EFSA guidelines.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 25 kg multi-wall paper bags with polyethylene liners for moisture protection. Store in dry, ventilated warehouses away from incompatible materials like bases, ensuring pallet stacking for easy access.

name: Liquid Caustic Soda
description: Liquid Caustic Soda is a 50% sodium hydroxide solution, clear and viscous alkaline liquid, highly corrosive and miscible with water, manufactured through electrolytic processes for industrial-grade purity. It serves as a strong base for neutralization and saponification, with controlled viscosity for safe handling in bulk operations as referenced in Sigma-Aldrich alkali specifications and ChemSpider solubility data.
physicalProperties: Liquid Caustic Soda is a 50% sodium hydroxide solution, clear and viscous alkaline liquid, highly corrosive and miscible with water, manufactured through electrolytic processes for industrial-grade purity. It serves as a strong base for neutralization and saponification, with controlled viscosity for safe handling in bulk operations as referenced in Sigma-Aldrich alkali specifications and ChemSpider solubility data.
safetyHandling: Causes severe burns on contact with skin or eyes; inhalation of mists leads to lung damage. High reactivity with acids produces heat; use full PPE including face shields; emergency neutralization with vinegar required per PubChem safety protocols.
tradeRegulatory: Delivered in 200 liter HDPE tanks with reinforced seals to prevent leaks during transport. Keep in bunded storage areas with corrosion-resistant flooring, labeled for hazardous material handling.

name: Sodium Lauryl Ether Sulfate
description: Sodium Lauryl Ether Sulfate is an anionic surfactant derived from ethoxylated lauryl alcohol, viscous yellow liquid with 70% active content, excellent foaming and emulsifying properties in hard water. It is biodegradable and widely used in cleaning formulations, meeting purity standards from Brenntag surfactants and EFSA cosmetic ingredient database.
physicalProperties: Sodium Lauryl Ether Sulfate is an anionic surfactant derived from ethoxylated lauryl alcohol, viscous yellow liquid with 70% active content, excellent foaming and emulsifying properties in hard water. It is biodegradable and widely used in cleaning formulations, meeting purity standards from Brenntag surfactants and EFSA cosmetic ingredient database.
safetyHandling: Irritates eyes and skin upon direct contact; may cause allergic dermatitis in sensitive individuals. Avoid aerosol formation to prevent inhalation; low toxicity but monitor environmental release; wear protective gear per ChemSpider hazard notes.
tradeRegulatory: Packed in 180 kg stainless steel drums with vented closures for pressure relief. Store upright in chemical-resistant shelving units, away from strong acids to avoid decomposition.

name: Paraformaldehyde
description: Paraformaldehyde is a white crystalline polymer of formaldehyde with a pungent odor. It depolymerizes upon heating to release formaldehyde gas.
physicalProperties: Paraformaldehyde is a white crystalline polymer of formaldehyde with a pungent odor. It depolymerizes upon heating to release formaldehyde gas.
safetyHandling: Toxic and irritant; handle with gloves and ventilation to avoid inhalation of vapors.
tradeRegulatory: Delivered in 25 kg PE-lined bags or drums. Store cool, dry, and sealed.

name: Caustic Soda Flakes
description: Caustic soda flakes are white, deliquescent solids that readily absorb moisture and carbon dioxide from the air. They dissolve exothermically in water, forming strong alkaline solutions.
physicalProperties: Caustic soda flakes are white, deliquescent solids that readily absorb moisture and carbon dioxide from the air. They dissolve exothermically in water, forming strong alkaline solutions.
safetyHandling: Highly corrosive to skin and eyes; reacts violently with acids and moisture. Handle with protective gear and avoid inhalation of dust.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 25 kg PP/PE bags. Store in a dry, well-ventilated area away from acids and moisture.

name: Pectin
description: Pectin is a white to light-beige polysaccharide derived from citrus peel or apple pomace. It forms gels in the presence of sugar and acid, acting as a natural hydrocolloid.
physicalProperties: Pectin is a white to light-beige polysaccharide derived from citrus peel or apple pomace. It forms gels in the presence of sugar and acid, acting as a natural hydrocolloid.
safetyHandling: Non-toxic and food-grade. Store in a moisture-free environment to maintain viscosity.
tradeRegulatory: Delivered in 20–25 kg multilayer paper bags. Store cool, dry, and sealed.

name: Pentaerythritol Tetranitrate
description: PETN is a white crystalline solid, highly explosive and sensitive to heat and shock. It is formed by nitration of pentaerythritol using nitric acid.
physicalProperties: PETN is a white crystalline solid, highly explosive and sensitive to heat and shock. It is formed by nitration of pentaerythritol using nitric acid.
safetyHandling: Highly explosive and sensitive; handle only in controlled environments with antistatic precautions.
tradeRegulatory: Delivered in sealed antistatic containers under inert gas. Store in cool, dry, and explosion-proof facilities.

name: Pentaerythritol
description: Pentaerythritol is a white crystalline polyol used as a key building block in resins and esters. It exhibits high thermal stability and low volatility.
physicalProperties: Pentaerythritol is a white crystalline polyol used as a key building block in resins and esters. It exhibits high thermal stability and low volatility.
safetyHandling: Non-toxic and stable; avoid moisture and dust generation.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 25 kg woven bags or 1,000 kg bulk sacks. Store in a cool, dry, ventilated place.

name: Perchlorethylene
description: Perchlorethylene is a clear colourless chlorinated solvent widely used in industrial cleaning and processing. It is valued for its strong solvency power, chemical stability and non flammable nature under normal conditions. The product is supplied in high purity grades for consistent industrial performance.
physicalProperties: Perchlorethylene is a clear colourless chlorinated solvent widely used in industrial cleaning and processing. It is valued for its strong solvency power, chemical stability and non flammable nature under normal conditions. The product is supplied in high purity grades for consistent industrial performance.
safetyHandling: Harmful if inhaled or swallowed. Vapours may cause dizziness or irritation. Suspected carcinogen with long term exposure. Use PPE and ensure good ventilation. Avoid release to environment.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 300 kilogram steel drums, IBC containers or bulk tankers. Store in cool and well ventilated areas.

name: Glycerin
description: Glycerin is a colorless, viscous, hygroscopic liquid with sweet taste and humectant properties. It is produced via saponification or biodiesel transesterification.
physicalProperties: Glycerin is a colorless, viscous, hygroscopic liquid with sweet taste and humectant properties. It is produced via saponification or biodiesel transesterification.
safetyHandling: Non-toxic and stable; may irritate eyes in concentrated form. Avoid overheating to prevent acrolein formation.
tradeRegulatory: Delivered in 250 kg drums or IBC tanks. Store in cool, dry, ventilated conditions.

name: Phycocyanin
description: Phycocyanin is a blue-colored protein pigment extracted from Spirulina platensis. It exhibits antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and fluorescent properties.
physicalProperties: Phycocyanin is a blue-colored protein pigment extracted from Spirulina platensis. It exhibits antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and fluorescent properties.
safetyHandling: Non-toxic and food-grade. Protect from light, heat, and oxidation to maintain color stability.
tradeRegulatory: Delivered in 1–5 kg aluminum foil pouches or 25 kg drums. Store at 5–15 °C, dark and dry.

name: Poly Aluminum Chloride
description: Poly aluminum chloride is a yellowish powder or liquid coagulant composed of aluminum hydroxide chloride polymers. It hydrolyzes rapidly in water to neutralize colloids.
physicalProperties: Poly aluminum chloride is a yellowish powder or liquid coagulant composed of aluminum hydroxide chloride polymers. It hydrolyzes rapidly in water to neutralize colloids.
safetyHandling: Mildly acidic and irritant; avoid inhalation and direct contact.
tradeRegulatory: Delivered in 25 kg bags or 1,200 kg IBC tanks. Store in a dry, covered area away from moisture.

name: Sodium Alginate
description: Sodium Alginate is a natural polysaccharide extracted from brown algae, white to light yellow powder forming gels with calcium ions, highly viscous in aqueous solutions. It offers stabilizing and thickening functions in food and pharma, with food-grade variants compliant with FDA inactive ingredient lists and PubChem polymer records.
physicalProperties: Sodium Alginate is a natural polysaccharide extracted from brown algae, white to light yellow powder forming gels with calcium ions, highly viscous in aqueous solutions. It offers stabilizing and thickening functions in food and pharma, with food-grade variants compliant with FDA inactive ingredient lists and PubChem polymer records.
safetyHandling: Generally safe but dust may cause respiratory irritation; gel hazards if ingested dry leading to blockage. Low allergenicity; avoid high concentrations in sensitive applications; use masks during powder handling per Sigma-Aldrich safety data.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 20 kg fiber drums with inner aluminum foil liners for light protection. Maintain cool, dry storage facilities with humidity controls to prevent clumping.

name: Sodium Aluminum Phosphate
description: Sodium Aluminum Phosphate is an acidic phosphate salt, white amorphous powder insoluble in water, reacting with bases for leavening action in baking. It provides slow gas release for dough stability, sourced synthetically with purity verified by ChemicalBook phosphates and EFSA food additive approvals.
physicalProperties: Sodium Aluminum Phosphate is an acidic phosphate salt, white amorphous powder insoluble in water, reacting with bases for leavening action in baking. It provides slow gas release for dough stability, sourced synthetically with purity verified by ChemicalBook phosphates and EFSA food additive approvals.
safetyHandling: Potential for aluminum toxicity with chronic intake; dust irritates eyes and lungs. Regulated dietary limits; avoid inhalation by using enclosed systems; monitor for neuro effects per PubChem toxicity profiles.
tradeRegulatory: Contained in 25 kg polypropylene bags with valve openings for easy pouring. Store in phosphate-dedicated ventilated rooms, stacked on pallets for airflow.

name: Sodium Acetate
description: Sodium Acetate is the trihydrate or anhydrous salt of acetic acid, white crystalline material highly soluble in water, acting as a buffer in pH 3.5-5.6 range. It is produced from glacial acetic acid neutralization, suitable for food and industrial uses per Brenntag acetates and ChemSpider solubility info.
physicalProperties: Sodium Acetate is the trihydrate or anhydrous salt of acetic acid, white crystalline material highly soluble in water, acting as a buffer in pH 3.5-5.6 range. It is produced from glacial acetic acid neutralization, suitable for food and industrial uses per Brenntag acetates and ChemSpider solubility info.
safetyHandling: Mild irritant to skin and eyes; ingestion causes nausea in large amounts. Low fire risk but hygroscopic; handle with gloves to prevent moisture absorption; per EFSA, safe in regulated quantities.
tradeRegulatory: Packed in 25 kg woven polypropylene totes with inner barriers against humidity. Keep in acetate storage bays with dehumidifiers for product integrity.

name: Sodium Acid Pyrophosphate
description: Sodium Acid Pyrophosphate is a pyrophosphate derivative, white granular powder soluble in water, providing acidic reaction for leavening with delayed activation. It is synthesized from phosphoric acid, meeting food-grade standards from Sigma-Aldrich phosphates and PubChem compound databases.
physicalProperties: Sodium Acid Pyrophosphate is a pyrophosphate derivative, white granular powder soluble in water, providing acidic reaction for leavening with delayed activation. It is synthesized from phosphoric acid, meeting food-grade standards from Sigma-Aldrich phosphates and PubChem compound databases.
safetyHandling: Can cause digestive upset if overconsumed; corrosive dust to mucous membranes. Low systemic toxicity; use respirators in dusty environments; comply with ADI limits per EFSA evaluations.
tradeRegulatory: Bagged in 25 kg kraft paper with polyethylene seals for durability. Store in dry pyrophosphate areas with shelf labeling for quick retrieval.

name: Polyethylene Glycol
description: Polyethylene glycol is a colorless to white, viscous polymer available in multiple molecular weights. It is soluble in water and many organic solvents.
physicalProperties: Polyethylene glycol is a colorless to white, viscous polymer available in multiple molecular weights. It is soluble in water and many organic solvents.
safetyHandling: Non-toxic and stable; store away from heat and strong oxidizers.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 25 kg bags, 200 kg drums, or IBC containers. Store cool, dry, and sealed.

name: Sodium Ascorbate
description: Sodium Ascorbate is the sodium derivative of ascorbic acid, white crystalline antioxidant powder fully soluble in water, less acidic than vitamin C for use in neutral products. Fermented from glucose, it aligns with FDA GRAS status and ChemicalBook vitamin entries.
physicalProperties: Sodium Ascorbate is the sodium derivative of ascorbic acid, white crystalline antioxidant powder fully soluble in water, less acidic than vitamin C for use in neutral products. Fermented from glucose, it aligns with FDA GRAS status and ChemicalBook vitamin entries.
safetyHandling: High doses lead to osmotic diarrhea; combustible in dust form with explosion potential. Avoid static sparks; low allergen risk but monitor; per PubChem, handle with grounded equipment.
tradeRegulatory: Boxed in 25 kg cartons with foil liners for oxidation prevention. Refrigerate in ascorbate cool storage with temperature logs.

name: Polyvinyl Alcohol
description: Polyvinyl alcohol is a white to cream-colored powder soluble in water and known for its excellent film-forming properties.
physicalProperties: Polyvinyl alcohol is a white to cream-colored powder soluble in water and known for its excellent film-forming properties.
safetyHandling: Non-toxic; avoid moisture to prevent caking. Handle in ventilated areas.
tradeRegulatory: Delivered in 25 kg paper bags. Store cool, dry, and sealed.

name: Sodium Benzoate
description: Sodium benzoate is benzoic acid’s sodium salt, white odorless granules soluble in water, an effective preservative against fungi in acidic conditions below pH 4.5. Synthesized from toluene oxidation, it meets purity specs from Brenntag preservatives and EFSA additive approvals.
physicalProperties: Sodium benzoate is benzoic acid’s sodium salt, white odorless granules soluble in water, an effective preservative against fungi in acidic conditions below pH 4.5. Synthesized from toluene oxidation, it meets purity specs from Brenntag preservatives and EFSA additive approvals.
safetyHandling: Forms benzene with ascorbic acid under heat; allergic reactions in sulfite-sensitive. Regulated ADI; avoid heated storage; use ventilation for dust per Sigma-Aldrich hazard data.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 25 kg polyethylene-lined fiber drums with secure lids. Keep in benzoate light-shielded warehouses to maintain efficacy.

name: Glycerol Ester
otherNames: Ester Gum, Glycerol Ester of Rosin
description: Glycerol esters are formed by esterification of glycerol with fatty acids, producing lipid-compatible compounds with emulsifying and stabilizing properties.
physicalProperties: Glycerol esters are formed by esterification of glycerol with fatty acids, producing lipid-compatible compounds with emulsifying and stabilizing properties.
safetyHandling: Non-toxic and food-grade. Avoid high heat and humidity to prevent hydrolysis.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 25 kg bags or 200 kg drums. Store sealed, cool, and dry.

name: Potassium Alum Salt
description: Potassium alum, or potash alum, is a colorless crystalline salt with strong astringent and coagulating properties.
physicalProperties: Potassium alum, or potash alum, is a colorless crystalline salt with strong astringent and coagulating properties.
safetyHandling: Non-toxic; avoid inhaling dust. Prolonged exposure may dry skin.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 25 kg bags or 1,000 kg bulk sacks. Store in cool, dry, and sealed areas.

name: Sodium Bifluoride
description: Sodium Bifluoride is sodium hydrogen difluoride, white crystalline solid soluble in water, releasing hydrofluoric acid for acidic fluoride applications. Produced from sodium fluoride and HF, it follows industrial standards from PubChem fluorides and ChemSpider structures.
physicalProperties: Sodium Bifluoride is sodium hydrogen difluoride, white crystalline solid soluble in water, releasing hydrofluoric acid for acidic fluoride applications. Produced from sodium fluoride and HF, it follows industrial standards from PubChem fluorides and ChemSpider structures.
safetyHandling: Highly toxic causing fluoride burns and hypocalcemia; inhalation leads to pulmonary edema. Provide calcium gluconate antidote; full PPE mandatory per GHS corrosive classifications.
tradeRegulatory: Sealed in 25 kg plastic pails with hazard labels for safe transit. Secure in bifluoride isolated cabinets with spill kits.

name: Sodium Bichromate
description: Sodium Bichromate is a dihydrate sodium dichromate, orange-red crystals highly soluble, strong oxidizer containing hexavalent chromium for tanning and pigmentation. Manufactured from chromite ore, it adheres to purity from Sigma-Aldrich chromates and Brenntag inorganics.
physicalProperties: Sodium Bichromate is a dihydrate sodium dichromate, orange-red crystals highly soluble, strong oxidizer containing hexavalent chromium for tanning and pigmentation. Manufactured from chromite ore, it adheres to purity from Sigma-Aldrich chromates and Brenntag inorganics.
safetyHandling: Carcinogenic via inhalation; causes chrome ulcers on skin. Chronic exposure risks cancer; use fume hoods and monitoring per PubChem toxicity warnings.
tradeRegulatory: Contained in 25 kg UN-approved polyethylene kegs with ventilation holes. Lock in bichromate hazardous material vaults away from reducers.

name: Potassium Bicarbonate
otherNames: Potassium Hydrogen Carbonate, Potassium Acid Carbonate
description: Potassium bicarbonate is a white crystalline powder soluble in water and mildly alkaline in solution.
physicalProperties: Potassium bicarbonate is a white crystalline powder soluble in water and mildly alkaline in solution.
safetyHandling: Non-toxic and stable; avoid contact with acids.
tradeRegulatory: Delivered in 25 kg paper bags or fiber drums. Store cool, dry, and tightly sealed.

name: Potassium Bitartrate
description: Potassium bitartrate, also known as cream of tartar, is a white crystalline organic acid salt derived from tartaric acid.
physicalProperties: Potassium bitartrate, also known as cream of tartar, is a white crystalline organic acid salt derived from tartaric acid.
safetyHandling: Non-toxic; avoid excessive humidity.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 25 kg paper bags or drums. Store in cool, dry, and sealed conditions.

name: Potassium Bromide
description: Potassium bromide is a colorless to white crystalline salt, odorless and highly soluble in water and glycerol. It is neutral in reaction and forms part of the halide family, structurally similar to sodium chloride. When heated, it releases hydrogen bromide vapors.
physicalProperties: Potassium bromide is a colorless to white crystalline salt, odorless and highly soluble in water and glycerol. It is neutral in reaction and forms part of the halide family, structurally similar to sodium chloride. When heated, it releases hydrogen bromide vapors.
safetyHandling: Non-flammable but harmful in excessive ingestion. Inhalation of dust should be avoided. Use PPE in laboratory settings.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 25 kg plastic-lined paper bags or 50 kg fiber drums. Store cool, dry, and sealed away from acids or oxidizers to prevent decomposition.

name: Potassium Ethyl Xanthate
description: Potassium ethyl xanthate is a pale-yellow crystalline powder or liquid with a distinct sulfurous odor. It’s soluble in water and decomposes upon heating or exposure to acids.
physicalProperties: Potassium ethyl xanthate is a pale-yellow crystalline powder or liquid with a distinct sulfurous odor. It’s soluble in water and decomposes upon heating or exposure to acids.
safetyHandling: Decomposes to form carbon disulfide, a flammable gas; handle under ventilation. Avoid skin contact and open flames. Classified as hazardous to aquatic environments.
tradeRegulatory: Delivered in 25 kg drums, woven sacks, or 1,000 kg IBC tanks with moisture barriers. Store in cool, dry, and well-ventilated conditions away from heat and acids.

name: Potassium Fluorosilicate
description: Potassium fluorosilicate is a fine white crystalline powder containing about 60% fluorine. It has low solubility in cold water and decomposes above 300 °C, releasing hydrogen fluoride.
physicalProperties: Potassium fluorosilicate is a fine white crystalline powder containing about 60% fluorine. It has low solubility in cold water and decomposes above 300 °C, releasing hydrogen fluoride.
safetyHandling: Toxic by ingestion and inhalation; prolonged exposure may affect bones and teeth due to fluoride content. Handle with respiratory protection and chemical-resistant gloves.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 25 kg multiwall paper bags with polyethylene liners or 1,000 kg bulk sacks. Store in a cool, dry, well-ventilated area away from acids.

name: Potassium Hydroxide
description: Potassium hydroxide, commonly called caustic potash, is a white deliquescent solid that absorbs CO₂ from air. It dissolves in water with intense heat evolution, forming a strong alkaline solution.
physicalProperties: Potassium hydroxide, commonly called caustic potash, is a white deliquescent solid that absorbs CO₂ from air. It dissolves in water with intense heat evolution, forming a strong alkaline solution.
safetyHandling: Corrosive to skin, eyes, and metals. Avoid contact with acids or organic materials. Use protective gloves, goggles, and ventilation during handling.
tradeRegulatory: Delivered in 25 kg HDPE-lined PP bags or 1,000 kg big bags. Store in dry, cool conditions, away from acids, aluminum, and moisture sources.

name: Potassium Iodate
description: Potassium iodate is a white crystalline oxidizer with strong stability and high iodine content (~59%). It dissolves in water to yield mildly acidic solutions.
physicalProperties: Potassium iodate is a white crystalline oxidizer with strong stability and high iodine content (~59%). It dissolves in water to yield mildly acidic solutions.
safetyHandling: Oxidizing and mildly irritating to skin and eyes; contact with combustible materials should be avoided. Handle under dry, ventilated conditions.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 25 kg PE-lined drums or multilayer paper bags. Store in a cool, dark, dry area away from acids, organics, and reducing agents.

name: Potassium Iodide
description: Potassium iodide is a white crystalline solid, odorless and highly soluble in water, ethanol, and glycerin. It is hygroscopic and releases iodine upon exposure to light or oxidants.
physicalProperties: Potassium iodide is a white crystalline solid, odorless and highly soluble in water, ethanol, and glycerin. It is hygroscopic and releases iodine upon exposure to light or oxidants.
safetyHandling: Non-toxic in regulated use; excessive intake may disturb thyroid function. Protect from light and air exposure.
tradeRegulatory: Delivered in 25 kg aluminum-lined fiber drums or double-layer foil bags. Store in cool, dry, and sealed environments away from oxidizers.

name: Potassium Carbonate
description: Potassium carbonate, also called potash, is a white hygroscopic powder soluble in water, producing mildly alkaline solutions. It has excellent buffering and deliquescent properties.
physicalProperties: Potassium carbonate, also called potash, is a white hygroscopic powder soluble in water, producing mildly alkaline solutions. It has excellent buffering and deliquescent properties.
safetyHandling: Low toxicity but may irritate eyes and skin. Avoid contact with acids as CO₂ release may occur.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 25 kg plastic-lined woven bags or 1,000 kg big bags. Store cool, dry, and sealed to prevent caking.

name: Potassium Chlorate
description: Potassium chlorate is a white crystalline oxidizing compound that decomposes above 400 °C to liberate oxygen. It is soluble in water and stable under ambient conditions.
physicalProperties: Potassium chlorate is a white crystalline oxidizing compound that decomposes above 400 °C to liberate oxygen. It is soluble in water and stable under ambient conditions.
safetyHandling: Highly reactive oxidizer; contact with organic materials or sulfur may cause explosion. Handle under strict safety protocols.
tradeRegulatory: Delivered in 25 kg PE-lined paper bags. Store in a cool, dry, non-combustible area away from reducing agents and heat.

name: Potassium Chloride
description: Potassium chloride is a colorless crystalline salt with a saline taste, readily soluble in water and glycerin. It provides a major potassium source for industrial and biological uses.
physicalProperties: Potassium chloride is a colorless crystalline salt with a saline taste, readily soluble in water and glycerin. It provides a major potassium source for industrial and biological uses.
safetyHandling: Non-toxic and stable; avoid excessive ingestion or contact with strong acids.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 25 kg PP bags or 1,000 kg bulk sacks. Store cool, dry, and sealed against humidity.

name: Potassium Cocoate
description: Potassium cocoate is a natural surfactant obtained by neutralizing coconut fatty acids with potassium hydroxide. It forms a light-colored viscous liquid or solid soap base.
physicalProperties: Potassium cocoate is a natural surfactant obtained by neutralizing coconut fatty acids with potassium hydroxide. It forms a light-colored viscous liquid or solid soap base.
safetyHandling: Non-toxic and non-irritating in diluted form; concentrated solutions may cause mild eye irritation.
tradeRegulatory: Delivered in 25 kg HDPE drums or 200 kg IBC containers. Store in cool, dry, and sealed containers away from strong acids.

name: Potassium Metavanadate
description: Potassium metavanadate is a white crystalline inorganic vanadium(V) compound with moderate solubility in water. It exhibits strong oxidizing and catalytic activity.
physicalProperties: Potassium metavanadate is a white crystalline inorganic vanadium(V) compound with moderate solubility in water. It exhibits strong oxidizing and catalytic activity.
safetyHandling: Toxic upon inhalation or ingestion; may irritate respiratory and digestive tracts. Use PPE and fume extraction during handling.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 25 kg PE-lined paper bags or fiber drums. Store cool, dry, and tightly sealed.

name: Potassium Nitrate
description: Potassium nitrate, commonly known as saltpeter, is a white crystalline solid highly soluble in water and slightly hygroscopic. It decomposes upon heating to release oxygen, leaving potassium nitrite as a residue.
physicalProperties: Potassium nitrate, commonly known as saltpeter, is a white crystalline solid highly soluble in water and slightly hygroscopic. It decomposes upon heating to release oxygen, leaving potassium nitrite as a residue.
safetyHandling: Classified as an oxidizer; may intensify combustion. Avoid mixing with organic materials or strong acids. Use protective gloves and goggles during handling.
tradeRegulatory: Delivered in 25 kg plastic-lined woven bags or 1,000 kg big bags. Store in a cool, dry, and ventilated environment, separated from flammables and reducing agents.

name: Potassium Orthovanadate
description: Potassium orthovanadate is a white crystalline compound containing trivalent vanadium species in alkaline form. It dissolves in water to produce strongly basic solutions and exhibits oxidizing potential.
physicalProperties: Potassium orthovanadate is a white crystalline compound containing trivalent vanadium species in alkaline form. It dissolves in water to produce strongly basic solutions and exhibits oxidizing potential.
safetyHandling: Toxic if inhaled or ingested; may cause respiratory and gastrointestinal irritation. Handle with gloves, goggles, and fume extraction.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 25 kg PE-lined paper bags or fiber drums. Store in a cool, dry, and sealed area away from acids and organic materials.

name: Potassium Permanganate
description: Potassium permanganate is a dark purple crystalline oxidizing agent with strong disinfectant and bleaching capabilities. It is soluble in water, producing violet-colored solutions with high redox potential.
physicalProperties: Potassium permanganate is a dark purple crystalline oxidizing agent with strong disinfectant and bleaching capabilities. It is soluble in water, producing violet-colored solutions with high redox potential.
safetyHandling: Strong oxidizer; reacts vigorously with organics and reducing agents. May cause burns upon contact with skin. Handle with care under ventilation and non-sparking conditions.
tradeRegulatory: Delivered in 25 kg HDPE drums or 50 kg composite containers. Store cool, dry, and tightly closed away from combustibles and acids.

name: Potassium Persulfate
description: Potassium persulfate is a white crystalline oxidizing salt with strong bleaching and radical-generating properties. It decomposes to release active oxygen species upon heating or in solution.
physicalProperties: Potassium persulfate is a white crystalline oxidizing salt with strong bleaching and radical-generating properties. It decomposes to release active oxygen species upon heating or in solution.
safetyHandling: Strong oxidizer and irritant; avoid contact with organic matter and moisture. Handle with gloves, goggles, and proper ventilation.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 25 kg PE-lined paper bags or 1,000 kg big bags. Store in a cool, dry, and well-ventilated area, isolated from combustible substances.

name: Potassium Sodium Tartrate
description: Potassium sodium tartrate, commonly known as Rochelle salt, is a colorless crystalline compound exhibiting piezoelectric and optical activity. It is freely soluble in water and forms neutral solutions.
physicalProperties: Potassium sodium tartrate, commonly known as Rochelle salt, is a colorless crystalline compound exhibiting piezoelectric and optical activity. It is freely soluble in water and forms neutral solutions.
safetyHandling: Non-toxic and stable under normal conditions; prolonged humidity exposure may cause clumping.
tradeRegulatory: Delivered in 25 kg paper bags or 50 kg fiber drums. Store in a cool, dry, and sealed environment protected from moisture.

name: Potassium Sorbate
description: Potassium sorbate is a white crystalline salt of sorbic acid with strong antimicrobial and antifungal properties. It is highly soluble in water, forming a neutral solution.
physicalProperties: Potassium sorbate is a white crystalline salt of sorbic acid with strong antimicrobial and antifungal properties. It is highly soluble in water, forming a neutral solution.
safetyHandling: Non-toxic and GRAS-approved; may cause mild irritation at high concentrations. Avoid prolonged exposure to humidity.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 25 kg PE-lined paper bags or fiber drums. Store in a cool, dry, and tightly sealed location away from direct sunlight.

name: Sodium Bisulfate
description: Sodium Bisulfate is sodium hydrogen sulfate, white granular acid salt soluble in water, a dry form of sulfuric acid for pH reduction without liquid risks. Synthesized from sodium chloride and sulfuric acid, per ChemicalBook sulfates and EFSA acidifiers.
physicalProperties: Sodium Bisulfate is sodium hydrogen sulfate, white granular acid salt soluble in water, a dry form of sulfuric acid for pH reduction without liquid risks. Synthesized from sodium chloride and sulfuric acid, per ChemicalBook sulfates and EFSA acidifiers.
safetyHandling: Corrosive to eyes and skin; dust causes throat irritation. Neutralize with bases; avoid aluminum contact; wear acid-resistant gear per GHS standards.
tradeRegulatory: Packed in 25 kg polypropylene bags with inner seals for moisture block. Store in bisulfate dry containment with acid spill trays.

name: Sodium Bromate
description: Sodium bromate is sodium salt of bromic acid, white crystalline oxidizer soluble in water, used for controlled oxidation in baking and chemistry. Produced from bromine electrolysis, compliant with PubChem oxidizers and Sigma-Aldrich halides.
physicalProperties: Sodium bromate is sodium salt of bromic acid, white crystalline oxidizer soluble in water, used for controlled oxidation in baking and chemistry. Produced from bromine electrolysis, compliant with PubChem oxidizers and Sigma-Aldrich halides.
safetyHandling: Potential carcinogen; explosive with combustibles. Banned in EU foods; limit exposure with respirators; fire suppression ready per EFSA restrictions.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 25 kg fiber-reinforced plastic cans with labels. Isolate in bromate oxidizer storage with fire doors.

name: Sodium Bromide
description: Sodium Bromide is bromide anion salt, white hygroscopic powder highly soluble, serving as bromide source for sedatives and fluids. Obtained from seawater or brines, per Brenntag halides and ChemSpider ions.
physicalProperties: Sodium Bromide is bromide anion salt, white hygroscopic powder highly soluble, serving as bromide source for sedatives and fluids. Obtained from seawater or brines, per Brenntag halides and ChemSpider ions.
safetyHandling: Chronic bromism causes rashes; mild eye irritants. Low acute toxicity; ventilate for dust; monitor thyroid per PubChem health effects.
tradeRegulatory: Bagged in 25 kg kraft with polyethylene liners for hygiene. Keep in bromide general chemical rooms.

name: Sodium Diacetate
description: Sodium Diacetate is a 1:1 complex of sodium acetate and acetic acid, white hygroscopic powder with acetic odor, acting as mold inhibitor and flavorant. Synthesized from acetic acid, meeting food standards from EFSA preservatives and ChemicalBook acetates.
physicalProperties: Sodium Diacetate is a 1:1 complex of sodium acetate and acetic acid, white hygroscopic powder with acetic odor, acting as mold inhibitor and flavorant. Synthesized from acetic acid, meeting food standards from EFSA preservatives and ChemicalBook acetates.
safetyHandling: Irritates eyes and nose from vapors; skin dryness possible. GRAS but odor control needed; use exhaust systems per Sigma-Aldrich data.
tradeRegulatory: Boxed in 25 kg cartons with vapor barriers for freshness. Store in diacetate odor-isolated facilities.

name: Sodium Etasulfate
description: Sodium Etasulfate, or sodium 2-ethylhexyl sulfate, is a branched anionic surfactant, clear liquid highly soluble, providing low foam wetting for industrial cleaning. Derived from 2-ethylhexanol sulfation, per Brenntag sulfates and PubChem surfactants.
physicalProperties: Sodium Etasulfate, or sodium 2-ethylhexyl sulfate, is a branched anionic surfactant, clear liquid highly soluble, providing low foam wetting for industrial cleaning. Derived from 2-ethylhexanol sulfation, per Brenntag sulfates and PubChem surfactants.
safetyHandling: Defats skin leading to dermatitis; eye corrosive in concentrates. Biodegradable; dilute with water; protective eyewear per GHS irritant labels.
tradeRegulatory: Contained in 200 kg HDPE barrels with screw caps for secure pouring. Upright in etasulfate chemical storage bays.

name: Potassium Sulfate
description: Potassium sulfate, or sulfate of potash, is a colorless crystalline solid that provides both potassium and sulfur nutrients without chloride contamination. It is moderately soluble in water and non-hygroscopic.
physicalProperties: Potassium sulfate, or sulfate of potash, is a colorless crystalline solid that provides both potassium and sulfur nutrients without chloride contamination. It is moderately soluble in water and non-hygroscopic.
safetyHandling: Non-toxic and stable; avoid contact with strong acids to prevent sulfur dioxide release.
tradeRegulatory: Delivered in 25 kg woven polypropylene bags or 1,000 kg big bags. Store in a dry, cool warehouse away from moisture.

name: Sodium Fluorosilicate
description: Sodium fluorosilicate is sodium hexafluorosilicate, white crystalline powder slightly soluble, used as a fluoride source for water and insecticides. Synthesized from silicon tetrafluoride, aligned with Sigma-Aldrich fluorides and EFSA fluoride additives.
physicalProperties: Sodium fluorosilicate is sodium hexafluorosilicate, white crystalline powder slightly soluble, used as a fluoride source for water and insecticides. Synthesized from silicon tetrafluoride, aligned with Sigma-Aldrich fluorides and EFSA fluoride additives.
safetyHandling: Fluoride toxicity causes nausea and bone issues; dust inhalation is hazardous. Aquatic persistent; calcium antidotes ready per PubChem warnings.
tradeRegulatory: Packaged in 25 kg lined polypropylene sacks with ties. Secure in fluorosilicate ventilated zones with spill kits.

name: Potassium Titanate
description: Potassium titanate is a white to gray ceramic compound composed of layered titanium oxide structures bonded with potassium ions. It exhibits excellent heat resistance and reinforcing characteristics.
physicalProperties: Potassium titanate is a white to gray ceramic compound composed of layered titanium oxide structures bonded with potassium ions. It exhibits excellent heat resistance and reinforcing characteristics.
safetyHandling: Non-toxic but may irritate respiratory passages if inhaled as fine dust. Use PPE and dust extraction during handling.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 25 kg paper bags or fiber drums. Store in a dry, ventilated place, sealed against humidity and contamination.

name: Sodium Fluoride
description: Sodium Fluoride is inorganic fluoride salt, white powder soluble in water, anticariogenic for tooth enamel strengthening. Produced from hydrofluoric acid, per Brenntag fluorides and ChemSpider halides.
physicalProperties: Sodium Fluoride is inorganic fluoride salt, white powder soluble in water, anticariogenic for tooth enamel strengthening. Produced from hydrofluoric acid, per Brenntag fluorides and ChemSpider halides.
safetyHandling: Acute poisoning with cardiac effects; chronic fluorosis on bones. Strict dosing; PPE for dust; monitor intake per EFSA limits.
tradeRegulatory: Sealed in 25 kg plastic-lined metal pails with locks. Store in fluoride secure cabinets.

name: Propargyl Alcohol
description: Propargyl alcohol is a clear, colorless liquid with a pungent odor and reactive terminal alkyne group. It is miscible with water, alcohol, and ether, and has high chemical reactivity in substitution and addition reactions.
physicalProperties: Propargyl alcohol is a clear, colorless liquid with a pungent odor and reactive terminal alkyne group. It is miscible with water, alcohol, and ether, and has high chemical reactivity in substitution and addition reactions.
safetyHandling: Toxic and flammable; harmful if inhaled or absorbed through skin. Handle under ventilation, avoiding ignition sources.
tradeRegulatory: Delivered in 180 kg steel drums or 1,000 L IBC tanks. Store cool, dry, and tightly closed in explosion-proof storage facilities.

name: Sodium Formate
description: Sodium Formate is formic acid sodium salt, white deliquescent crystals soluble, reducing agent for de-icing and tanning. From carbon monoxide reaction, compliant with PubChem formates and Sigma-Aldrich organics.
physicalProperties: Sodium Formate is formic acid sodium salt, white deliquescent crystals soluble, reducing agent for de-icing and tanning. From carbon monoxide reaction, compliant with PubChem formates and Sigma-Aldrich organics.
safetyHandling: Eye and skin mild irritant; low toxicity but hygroscopic dust. Avoid oxidants; gloves for handling per ChemicalBook safety.
tradeRegulatory: Bagged in 25 kg woven with moisture barriers. Keep in formate low-humidity storage.

name: Sodium Gluconate
