physicalProperties: Yucca schidigera extract is a brown powder or liquid from a yucca plant, containing saponins (10-60%), resveratrol, and yuccaols. Soluble in water, with soapy taste; density 1.1 g/cm³ for liquid, pH 4-6; produced by extraction, used for odor control and anti-inflammatory.
safetyHandling: Low toxicity; may cause gastrointestinal upset. Irritates eyes; avoid dust. Stable; use PPE; no major hazards but monitor for saponin effects.
tradeRegulatory: Packaged in 25kg drums with liners; store in cool, dry places per ChemicalBook product info.

name: Bay Leaf Extract
otherNames: Bay Laurel Extract, Laurus Nobilis Leaf Extract
description: Bay leaf extract from Laurus nobilis leaves is a brown powder or liquid with polyphenols, flavonoids, and eugenol. Soluble in water/ethanol, pH 4-5; density ~1.0 g/cm³; produced by solvent extraction, used for antioxidant and antimicrobial effects.
physicalProperties: Bay leaf extract from Laurus nobilis leaves is a brown powder or liquid with polyphenols, flavonoids, and eugenol. Soluble in water/ethanol, pH 4-5; density ~1.0 g/cm³; produced by solvent extraction, used for antioxidant and antimicrobial effects.
safetyHandling: Low toxicity; irritant to eyes/skin. Avoid in pregnancy; stable. Use PPE; no major hazards but monitor for sensitivities.
tradeRegulatory: Packaged in 25kg fiber drums with PE liners; store dry per FDA food substance guidelines.

name: Indian Bay Leaf
description: Indian bay leaf is an aromatic herb obtained from Cinnamomum tamala. It contains eugenol, cinnamaldehyde, and terpene compounds that impart spicy flavor and antimicrobial activity.
physicalProperties: Indian bay leaf is an aromatic herb obtained from Cinnamomum tamala. It contains eugenol, cinnamaldehyde, and terpene compounds that impart spicy flavor and antimicrobial activity.
safetyHandling: Non-toxic and safe for consumption. Store away from moisture and direct sunlight to maintain aroma.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 20–25 kg paper sacks or jute bags. Store cool, dry, and sealed.

name: Indian Bay Leaf Oil
description: Indian bay leaf oil is a pale-yellow essential oil obtained by steam distillation of Cinnamomum tamala leaves. It possesses a warm, spicy aroma rich in eugenol and cinnamic aldehydes.
physicalProperties: Indian bay leaf oil is a pale-yellow essential oil obtained by steam distillation of Cinnamomum tamala leaves. It possesses a warm, spicy aroma rich in eugenol and cinnamic aldehydes.
safetyHandling: Concentrated oil may irritate skin; handle diluted and avoid direct sunlight.
tradeRegulatory: Delivered in 5–25 kg aluminum containers or HDPE drums. Store sealed, cool, and dark.

name: Inosine
description: Inosine is a purine nucleoside formed by hypoxanthine and ribose. It appears as a white crystalline powder with high water solubility and biochemical stability.
physicalProperties: Inosine is a purine nucleoside formed by hypoxanthine and ribose. It appears as a white crystalline powder with high water solubility and biochemical stability.
safetyHandling: Non-toxic and stable; store away from heat, light, and moisture.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 1–25 kg aluminum-lined fiber drums. Store cool, dry, and tightly closed.

name: Pullulan
description: Pullulan is a linear polysaccharide composed of maltotriose units linked by α-1,6 glycosidic bonds, produced through fermentation by the fungus Aureobasidium pullulans. This white, odorless, and tasteless powder is highly soluble in water, forming clear, flexible films with exceptional oxygen barrier properties and biodegradability, making it suitable for advanced material applications in controlled environments.
physicalProperties: Pullulan is a linear polysaccharide composed of maltotriose units linked by α-1,6 glycosidic bonds, produced through fermentation by the fungus Aureobasidium pullulans. This white, odorless, and tasteless powder is highly soluble in water, forming clear, flexible films with exceptional oxygen barrier properties and biodegradability, making it suitable for advanced material applications in controlled environments.
safetyHandling: Classified as GRAS by FDA with no significant toxicity in standard doses; however, prolonged dust exposure may cause mild respiratory or eye irritation in industrial settings. Rare allergic reactions reported in sensitive workers; avoid mixing with strong acids to prevent degradation; always ensure proper ventilation and use dust masks during bulk transfers per occupational guidelines.
tradeRegulatory: Distributed in 20 kg double-layered fiber drums equipped with desiccant liners for moisture control. Warehouse in regulated humidity areas, stacked on pallets to facilitate forklift handling and inventory rotation.

name: Trehalose
description: Trehalose is regarded as a safe and gentle ingredient for topical application, well tolerated by all skin types. No cases of skin reactions have been reported. The advantage of trehalose is to protect proteins from chemical reactions: denaturation and inactivation. These reactions can be caused by freezing, dehydration, or high temperatures.
physicalProperties: Trehalose is regarded as a safe and gentle ingredient for topical application, well tolerated by all skin types. No cases of skin reactions have been reported. The advantage of trehalose is to protect proteins from chemical reactions: denaturation and inactivation. These reactions can be caused by freezing, dehydration, or high temperatures.
safetyHandling: GRAS status; may cause mild eye irritation or skin contact issues; wear safety glasses with side shields (or goggles); avoid breathing dust/fume/gas/mist/vapors/spray; in case of inadequate ventilation wear respiratory protection; not expected to present a significant hazard under anticipated conditions.
tradeRegulatory: Packaged in 100g or 500g containers for laboratory use, or bulk in fiber drums; store tightly closed as per GoldBio SDS to maintain quality.

name: Gibberellic Acid
description: Gibberellic acid is a plant growth regulator produced by Gibberella fujikuroi. It appears as a white crystalline powder soluble in ethanol and weakly soluble in water.
physicalProperties: Gibberellic acid is a plant growth regulator produced by Gibberella fujikuroi. It appears as a white crystalline powder soluble in ethanol and weakly soluble in water.
safetyHandling: Low toxicity; avoid direct contact and exposure to high humidity. Use gloves during handling.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 1–25 kg foil-sealed drums or sachets. Store cool, dry, and away from light to preserve bioactivity.

name: Polysorbate 60
description: Polysorbate 60 is a non-ionic emulsifier synthesized from sorbitol, stearic acid, and ethylene oxide, appearing as a pale yellow viscous liquid or waxy solid with an HLB value of approximately 14.9. It excels in creating stable oil-in-water emulsions, with good thermal stability up to 100°C, commonly utilized in formulations requiring consistent texture and phase separation prevention across varying pH levels.
physicalProperties: Polysorbate 60 is a non-ionic emulsifier synthesized from sorbitol, stearic acid, and ethylene oxide, appearing as a pale yellow viscous liquid or waxy solid with an HLB value of approximately 14.9. It excels in creating stable oil-in-water emulsions, with good thermal stability up to 100°C, commonly utilized in formulations requiring consistent texture and phase separation prevention across varying pH levels.
safetyHandling: Generally well-tolerated with low acute toxicity, but may provoke skin sensitization or gastrointestinal discomfort in high concentrations; not recommended for direct inhalation. Per EFSA evaluations, adhere to purity standards to minimize impurities; employ protective gear like gloves and goggles during mixing to avoid splashes or prolonged contact.
tradeRegulatory: Shipped in 180 kg epoxy-coated steel barrels with pressure-release valves for safe transport. Maintain upright in temperature-monitored facilities, labeled for quick identification in multi-product storage systems.

name: Polysorbate 80
description: Polysorbate 80, derived from sorbitan monooleate ethoxylated with 20 moles of ethylene oxide, is an amber-colored oily liquid with HLB 15, fully miscible in water and most organic solvents. It provides superior solubilizing capabilities for hydrophobic compounds, maintaining stability in electrolyte-rich solutions and over a broad pH range from 3 to 11.
physicalProperties: Polysorbate 80, derived from sorbitan monooleate ethoxylated with 20 moles of ethylene oxide, is an amber-colored oily liquid with HLB 15, fully miscible in water and most organic solvents. It provides superior solubilizing capabilities for hydrophobic compounds, maintaining stability in electrolyte-rich solutions and over a broad pH range from 3 to 11.
safetyHandling: FDA-approved with potential for allergic responses in individuals sensitive to oleic acid derivatives; high doses linked to minor digestive issues. Monitor for ethylene oxide residues per regulatory limits; utilize enclosed systems for handling to reduce vapor exposure and ensure compliance with occupational exposure thresholds.
tradeRegulatory: Contained in 200 liter high-density polyethylene totes with tamper-proof seals. Store in ventilated chemical bays, segregated from incompatible substances like peroxides to prevent unintended reactions.

name: Penicillin V Potassium Salt
description: Penicillin V Potassium Salt is the potassium derivative of phenoxymethylpenicillin, a beta-lactam antibiotic presenting as a white or off-white crystalline powder with moderate water solubility and enhanced stability in acidic gastric conditions. It targets penicillin-binding proteins to inhibit bacterial cell wall synthesis, effective against streptococci and staphylococci in therapeutic dosages.
physicalProperties: Penicillin V Potassium Salt is the potassium derivative of phenoxymethylpenicillin, a beta-lactam antibiotic presenting as a white or off-white crystalline powder with moderate water solubility and enhanced stability in acidic gastric conditions. It targets penicillin-binding proteins to inhibit bacterial cell wall synthesis, effective against streptococci and staphylococci in therapeutic dosages.
safetyHandling: High risk of hypersensitivity reactions, including severe anaphylaxis; contraindicated for those with beta-lactam allergies. Biohazard classification requires controlled environments; avoid aerosol formation during processing to prevent inhalation; dispose via incineration following pharmaceutical waste protocols to mitigate environmental antibiotic resistance.
tradeRegulatory: Enclosed in 15 kg sterile aluminum composite canisters with vacuum seals for sterility maintenance. Refrigerate in dedicated pharma-grade coolers, monitored for temperature excursions during transit.

name: HATU
description: HATU is a peptide coupling reagent offering high efficiency and minimal racemization. It appears as a pale-yellow crystalline powder soluble in DMF and DCM.
physicalProperties: HATU is a peptide coupling reagent offering high efficiency and minimal racemization. It appears as a pale-yellow crystalline powder soluble in DMF and DCM.
safetyHandling: Irritant to eyes and skin; handle in inert, moisture-free conditions. Use gloves and avoid inhalation of dust.
tradeRegulatory: Delivered in 1–5 kg amber glass bottles or aluminum drums. Store cool, dry, and inert, protected from light and humidity.

name: Bay Leaf Oil
description: Bay leaf oil, from Pimenta racemosa leaves, is a yellow to brown liquid with density 0.9-0.95 g/cm³, refractive index 1.472-1.476, boiling range 220-250°C, flash point >60°C. Soluble in alcohol, insoluble in water; herbal odor, composed of eugenol (42-56%), myrcene (20-30%), chavicol (8-13%); obtained by steam distillation.
physicalProperties: Bay leaf oil, from Pimenta racemosa leaves, is a yellow to brown liquid with density 0.9-0.95 g/cm³, refractive index 1.472-1.476, boiling range 220-250°C, flash point >60°C. Soluble in alcohol, insoluble in water; herbal odor, composed of eugenol (42-56%), myrcene (20-30%), chavicol (8-13%); obtained by steam distillation.
safetyHandling: Irritant to skin/eyes; may cause sensitization. Combustible; avoid ingestion. Stable; use PPE; low toxicity but monitor for allergies.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 25kg aluminum drums or 1kg glass bottles; store cool and dark per ChemicalBook FCC standards.

name: Vitamin E Gamma-Tocopherol
description: Gamma-tocopherol is a form of vitamin E with formula C28H48O2 and molecular weight 416.68 g/mol. It is a pale yellow oily liquid, density 0.95 g/cm³, boiling point 157°C at 0.1 mmHg, soluble in organics, insoluble in water; more potent antioxidant than alpha in some contexts, found in plant oils.
physicalProperties: Gamma-tocopherol is a form of vitamin E with formula C28H48O2 and molecular weight 416.68 g/mol. It is a pale yellow oily liquid, density 0.95 g/cm³, boiling point 157°C at 0.1 mmHg, soluble in organics, insoluble in water; more potent antioxidant than alpha in some contexts, found in plant oils.
safetyHandling: Low toxicity; may irritate skin or eyes upon contact. Avoid strong oxidizers; stable but oxidised in air. Use PPE; no major hazards but monitor for hypersensitivity.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 1mg or 5mg ampules for analytical standards; store under nitrogen in cool places per Sigma-Aldrich catalog.

name: Vitamin K1 Phylloquinone
description: Phylloquinone, also known as vitamin K1, is a yellow viscous oil or powder with formula C31H46O2 and molecular weight 450.70 g/mol. Density 0.984 g/cm³, boiling point 546.4°C at 760 mmHg, flash point 200.4°C, refractive index 1.527. Insoluble in water, soluble in organics like chloroform and ether, light-sensitive, produced from plants or synthetically; cofactor for blood clotting.
physicalProperties: Phylloquinone, also known as vitamin K1, is a yellow viscous oil or powder with formula C31H46O2 and molecular weight 450.70 g/mol. Density 0.984 g/cm³, boiling point 546.4°C at 760 mmHg, flash point 200.4°C, refractive index 1.527. Insoluble in water, soluble in organics like chloroform and ether, light-sensitive, produced from plants or synthetically; cofactor for blood clotting.
safetyHandling: Low toxicity but may cause skin irritation or allergic reactions; avoid strong oxidizers. Stable but decomposes with light; use PPE, ventilate. Hazard Class not specified; monitor for jaundice in newborns.
tradeRegulatory: Packaged in 25kg drums with inner aluminum foil for light protection; store sealed in cool areas per ChemicalBook recommendations.

name: Vitamin K2 MK-4
description: Menaquinone-4 (MK-4), a form of vitamin K2, is a yellow powder with formula C31H40O2 and molecular weight 444.65 g/mol. Melting point 35°C, soluble in fats, insoluble in water; produced synthetically or from animal sources; cofactor for protein carboxylation in bone and vascular health.
physicalProperties: Menaquinone-4 (MK-4), a form of vitamin K2, is a yellow powder with formula C31H40O2 and molecular weight 444.65 g/mol. Melting point 35°C, soluble in fats, insoluble in water; produced synthetically or from animal sources; cofactor for protein carboxylation in bone and vascular health.
safetyHandling: Low toxicity; may interact with anticoagulants causing bleeding risks. Avoid strong oxidizers; stable. Use PPE; monitor for drug interactions in patients.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 1kg or 5kg aluminum cans; store in dark, dry places per Sigma-Aldrich SDS.

name: Vitamin K3 Menadione Sodium Bisulfite
description: Vitamin K3 Menadione Sodium Bisulfite is a synthetic water soluble vitamin compound supplied as a yellow crystalline powder. It is used primarily in animal nutrition and pharmaceutical applications where stable vitamin K activity is required.
physicalProperties: Vitamin K3 Menadione Sodium Bisulfite is a synthetic water soluble vitamin compound supplied as a yellow crystalline powder. It is used primarily in animal nutrition and pharmaceutical applications where stable vitamin K activity is required.
safetyHandling: Harmful if swallowed in large quantities. May cause skin or eye irritation. Handle with PPE and follow good manufacturing practice. Avoid prolonged exposure.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 25 kilogram fibre drums or HDPE containers with inner liners. Store in cool and dry conditions protected from light.

name: Vitamin K3 Menadione Dimethylpyrimidinol Bisulfite
description: Menadione dimethylpyrimidinol bisulfite, a vitamin K3 derivative, is a white powder with formula C17H18N2O6S and molecular weight 378.40 g/mol. Soluble in water, used as a stable vitamin K form; produced by complexing menadione with dimethylpyrimidinol and bisulfite; for clotting factor synthesis.
physicalProperties: Menadione dimethylpyrimidinol bisulfite, a vitamin K3 derivative, is a white powder with formula C17H18N2O6S and molecular weight 378.40 g/mol. Soluble in water, used as a stable vitamin K form; produced by complexing menadione with dimethylpyrimidinol and bisulfite; for clotting factor synthesis.
safetyHandling: Low toxicity but may irritate skin and eyes; avoid inhalation. Stable; use PPE. No major risks but monitor for allergies.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 25kg bags with moisture barriers; store dry per general vitamin SDS.

name: Vitamin K3 Menadione Nicotinamide Bisulfite
description: Menadione nicotinamide bisulfite, a vitamin K3 form, is a white powder with formula C17H16N2O6S and molecular weight 376.38 g/mol. Soluble in water, used as water-soluble vitamin K; produced by combining menadione with nicotinamide and bisulfite; for coagulation support.
physicalProperties: Menadione nicotinamide bisulfite, a vitamin K3 form, is a white powder with formula C17H16N2O6S and molecular weight 376.38 g/mol. Soluble in water, used as water-soluble vitamin K; produced by combining menadione with nicotinamide and bisulfite; for coagulation support.
safetyHandling: Irritant to skin and eyes; may cause respiratory issues. Avoid oxidizers; decompose to fumes. Use PPE; ventilate; monitor for sensitivities.
tradeRegulatory: Packaged in 25kg drums with inner seals; store in dry, ventilated places per ChemicalBook SDS.

name: Adenosine
description: Adenosine (C₁₀H₁₃N₅O₄) is a nucleoside formed by adenine and ribose, crucial in cellular energy transfer and biochemical signaling. Industrial production is typically achieved by fermentation or enzymatic synthesis.
physicalProperties: Adenosine (C₁₀H₁₃N₅O₄) is a nucleoside formed by adenine and ribose, crucial in cellular energy transfer and biochemical signaling. Industrial production is typically achieved by fermentation or enzymatic synthesis.
safetyHandling: Low toxicity when handled properly. Dust may cause mild irritation. Use PPE and follow controlled handling procedures.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 1 kilogram, 5 kilogram or 25 kilogram fibre drums or HDPE containers. Store in cool and dry conditions protected from light.

name: Guanosine
description: Guanosine is a purine nucleoside composed of guanine and ribose. It plays essential roles in RNA synthesis and cellular energy metabolism.
physicalProperties: Guanosine is a purine nucleoside composed of guanine and ribose. It plays essential roles in RNA synthesis and cellular energy metabolism.
safetyHandling: Stable and low-toxicity; store protected from light and moisture to prevent hydrolysis.
tradeRegulatory: Delivered in 1–25 kg foil-lined fiber drums or bottles. Store sealed, cool, and dry.

name: Vitamin B12 Adenosylcobalamin
description: Vitamin B12 adenosylcobalamin is a coenzyme form with formula C72H100CoN18O17P and molecular weight 1579.58 g/mol. Red powder, soluble in water, essential for methylmalonyl-CoA mutase.
physicalProperties: Vitamin B12 adenosylcobalamin is a coenzyme form with formula C72H100CoN18O17P and molecular weight 1579.58 g/mol. Red powder, soluble in water, essential for methylmalonyl-CoA mutase.
safetyHandling: Low toxicity; may cause allergic reactions in sensitive people. Irritates skin; light-sensitive. Use PPE; monitor for hypersensitivity or side effects.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 1g vials with desiccants; store frozen per Sigma-Aldrich catalog to preserve potency.

name: Vitamin D2 Ergocalciferol
description: Ergocalciferol, also known as vitamin D2, is a white to off-white crystalline powder with the formula C28H44O and molecular weight 396.65 g/mol. It has a density of 0.96 g/cm³, melting point 114-118°C, boiling point 496.4°C at 760 mmHg, flash point 214.2°C, and refractive index 1.52. Insoluble in water, soluble in organic solvents like ethanol and chloroform, it is light-sensitive, oxidizing in air, and produced by UV irradiation of ergosterol from yeast or plants.
physicalProperties: Ergocalciferol, also known as vitamin D2, is a white to off-white crystalline powder with the formula C28H44O and molecular weight 396.65 g/mol. It has a density of 0.96 g/cm³, melting point 114-118°C, boiling point 496.4°C at 760 mmHg, flash point 214.2°C, and refractive index 1.52. Insoluble in water, soluble in organic solvents like ethanol and chloroform, it is light-sensitive, oxidizing in air, and produced by UV irradiation of ergosterol from yeast or plants.

name: Fluroxypyr
description: Fluroxypyr (ISO common name) is an off-white to tan crystalline solid with the formula C7H5Cl2FN2O3 and molecular weight 255.03 g/mol. Technical grade purity is typically ≥97%. It has low water solubility (0.09 g/L at 20 °C), is soluble in acetone and methanol, and has a melting point of 164–166 °C. It is a pyridine carboxylic acid herbicide that acts as a synthetic auxin, absorbed by leaves and roots, and translocated to meristematic tissues causing uncontrolled growth in broadleaf weeds.

name: 2,4-Dichlorophenoxyacetic Acid
description: 2,4-Dichlorophenoxyacetic acid (2,4-D) is a white to yellow crystalline powder with formula C8H6Cl2O3 and molecular weight 221.04 g/mol. It has a density of 1.42 g/cm³, melting point 138°C, boiling point 160°C at 0.4 mmHg; slightly soluble in water (0.9 g/L), soluble in organics; systemic herbicide, synthetic auxin. Produced by chlorination of phenoxyacetic acid, it mimics plant growth hormones causing uncontrolled growth in broadleaf weeds.
physicalProperties: 2,4-Dichlorophenoxyacetic acid (2,4-D) is a white to yellow crystalline powder with formula C8H6Cl2O3 and molecular weight 221.04 g/mol. It has a density of 1.42 g/cm³, melting point 138°C, boiling point 160°C at 0.4 mmHg; slightly soluble in water (0.9 g/L), soluble in organics; systemic herbicide, synthetic auxin. Produced by chlorination of phenoxyacetic acid, it mimics plant growth hormones causing uncontrolled growth in broadleaf weeds.
safetyHandling: Irritant to eyes/skin/respiratory (H315, H318, H335); possible endocrine disruptor and carcinogen (IARC Group 2B). Harmful if swallowed (H302); avoid dust inhalation. Stable but decomposes at high heat; incompatible with strong bases/oxidizers. Use PPE, ventilate; monitor exposure.
tradeRegulatory: Typically in 25kg multi-wall paper bags with PE liners or fiber drums; store in cool, dry, ventilated areas away from food per Sigma-Aldrich SDS.

name: Dicamba
description: Dicamba (3,6-dichloro-2-methoxybenzoic acid) is an off-white to tan crystalline solid with formula C8H6Cl2O3 and molecular weight 221.04 g/mol. Technical grade purity ≥98%. Density 1.57 g/cm³, melting point 114–116 °C, vapour pressure 4.5 mPa at 20 °C. Moderately soluble in water (6.5 g/L at 25 °C, pH-dependent), highly soluble in polar organics. It is a benzoic-acid systemic herbicide that acts as a synthetic auxin, rapidly absorbed by leaves and roots and translocated throughout the plant.
physicalProperties: Dicamba (3,6-dichloro-2-methoxybenzoic acid) is an off-white to tan crystalline solid with formula C8H6Cl2O3 and molecular weight 221.04 g/mol. Technical grade purity ≥98%. Density 1.57 g/cm³, melting point 114–116 °C, vapour pressure 4.5 mPa at 20 °C. Moderately soluble in water (6.5 g/L at 25 °C, pH-dependent), highly soluble in polar organics. It is a benzoic-acid systemic herbicide that acts as a synthetic auxin, rapidly absorbed by leaves and roots and translocated throughout the plant.
safetyHandling: Acute toxicity low (LD50 oral rat >2000 mg/kg); moderate eye irritant (H319), skin sensitiser possible. Chronic concerns include potential endocrine disruption and developmental toxicity (EPA/EU review ongoing). Low bioaccumulation, moderate aquatic toxicity (fish LC50 ~100 mg/L). Stable under normal conditions but hydrolyses in strong alkali. Use PPE (gloves, goggles, respirator if dusty); ventilate; avoid drift to sensitive crops.
tradeRegulatory: Technical grade supplied in 25 kg or 500 kg multi-wall paper bags or fiber drums with PE liners; formulated products in 10–20 L HDPE coex jerricans or 200 L drums; store cool, dry, well-ventilated, away from food/feed.

Non-hygroscopic, it decomposes at high temperatures without melting and is sourced from natural deposits, often used in purified forms for industrial applications.

name: Sodium Selenite 45%
description: Sodium selenite 45% is a formulation containing 45% sodium selenite (Na2SeO3), a white crystalline solid with molecular weight 172.94 g/mol. It has a density greater than water, is highly soluble in water, and appears as a powder or granules. Insoluble in organic solvents, it decomposes on heating, releasing selenium oxides. This concentration is typically blended with carriers for stability and ease of handling in industrial applications.
physicalProperties: Sodium selenite 45% is a formulation containing 45% sodium selenite (Na2SeO3), a white crystalline solid with molecular weight 172.94 g/mol. It has a density greater than water, is highly soluble in water, and appears as a powder or granules. Insoluble in organic solvents, it decomposes on heating, releasing selenium oxides. This concentration is typically blended with carriers for stability and ease of handling in industrial applications.

name: Sodium Selenite Premix 1%-10%
description: Sodium selenite premix 1%-10% consists of sodium selenite (Na2SeO3) diluted to 1-10% concentration with inert carriers like calcium carbonate for uniform distribution. The active compound is a white powder, soluble in water, with molecular weight 172.94 g/mol and density exceeding water. It ensures controlled selenium delivery in formulations.

name: Sodium Molybdate Dihydrate
description: Sodium molybdate dihydrate, formula Na2MoO4·2H2O, is a white crystalline powder with molecular weight 241.95 g/mol. It has a density of 2.37 g/mL, melting point 100°C (decomposes), and is highly soluble in water. Bulk density 1000-1400 kg/m³; stable under ambient conditions, produced by dissolving molybdenum trioxide in sodium hydroxide.
physicalProperties: Sodium molybdate dihydrate, formula Na2MoO4·2H2O, is a white crystalline powder with molecular weight 241.95 g/mol. name: Sodium Hyaluronate
description: Sodium hyaluronate, the sodium salt of hyaluronic acid, is a white powder with formula (C14H20NNaO11)n and variable high molecular weight. Highly hygroscopic, soluble in water forming viscous solutions, insoluble in organics; stable for 3 years in sealed containers, produced from microbial fermentation or extraction.

Highly hygroscopic, soluble in water forming viscous solutions, insoluble in organics; stable for 3 years in sealed containers, produced from microbial fermentation or extraction.

name: Sialic Acid
description: Sialic acid, primarily N-acetylneuraminic acid (C11H19NO9), is a white powder with molecular weight 309.27 g/mol. Soluble in water, it has a melting point around 185°C (decomposes) and is biosynthesized via aldolase enzymes. Odorless, stable, and found naturally in animals and microbes.

name: Citicoline Monosodium Salt
description: Citicoline monosodium salt (C14H25N4NaO11P2) is a white powder with molecular weight 510.31 g/mol, soluble in water. It acts as a biosynthetic intermediate for phospholipids, stable under ambient conditions, and produced synthetically.

name: Bovine Collagen

name: Tartrazine Lake
description: Tartrazine is a synthetic lemon yellow azo dye primarily used as a food coloring. An anionic, hydrophilic azo dye with an orange-yellow color used in fabrics, foods and cosmetics, and as a biological stain. Tartrazine is a synthetic additive with high water solubility. Tartrazine is mostly used as a colorant in the manufacture of cheese, cake, bubble gum, pudding.

name: Strontium Peroxide

It has a density of 4.56 g/cm³, decomposes above 500°C releasing oxygen, and is insoluble in water but reacts with acids. Oxidizer, produced by reacting strontium hydroxide with hydrogen peroxide.

name: Tranexamic Acid
description: Tranexamic acid is an antifibrinolytic used to reduce or prevent hemorrhagic episodes, especially in the context of hyperfibrinolytic disorders. name: Tylosin Tartrate
description: Tylosin is a bacteriostatic macrolide antibiotic and feed additive used in veterinary medicine. It has a broad spectrum of activity against Gram-positive organisms and a limited range of Gram-negative organisms. A veterinary antibacterial used to treat sensitive mycoplasma organisms which are involved in causing chronic respiratory disease in chickens and infectious sinusitis in turkeys. It is also effective in treating swine dysentery caused by Serpulina hyodysenteriae and arthritis caused by Mycoplasma hyosynoviae.

Gellan gum is widely used in food, pharmaceutical and personal care formulations that require precise texture control and long term stability.

name: Vitamin B1 Mononitrate
description: Vitamin B1 mononitrate is a white crystalline powder with formula C12H17N5O4S and molecular weight 327.36 g/mol. Density 1.31 g/cm³, melting point 190-200°C, soluble in water (50 g/L), odorless; stable form of thiamine.
physicalProperties: Vitamin B1 mononitrate is a white crystalline powder with formula C12H17N5O4S and molecular weight 327.36 g/mol. Density 1.31 g/cm³, melting point 190-200°C, soluble in water (50 g/L), odorless; stable form of thiamine.
safetyHandling: Low toxicity, GRAS; may cause allergic reactions. Irritates eyes/skin; avoid dust. Stable; use PPE, ventilate.
tradeRegulatory: In 25kg bags with moisture barriers; store in cool, dry areas per Redox SDS.

name: Vitamin A Palmitate
description: Vitamin A palmitate is a yellow oily liquid or powder with formula C36H60O2 and molecular weight 524.86 g/mol. Density 0.95 g/cm³, melting point 28-29°C, soluble in fats, insoluble in water; ester of retinol.
physicalProperties: Vitamin A palmitate is a yellow oily liquid or powder with formula C36H60O2 and molecular weight 524.86 g/mol. Density 0.95 g/cm³, melting point 28-29°C, soluble in fats, insoluble in water; ester of retinol.
safetyHandling: Low toxicity in moderate doses; high doses cause hypervitaminosis A. Irritates eyes/skin; light-sensitive. Use PPE; avoid oxidizers.
tradeRegulatory: In 25kg drums with nitrogen purge; store in dark, cool places per Fisher Scientific SDS.

name: Calcium Phosphate
description: Calcium phosphate is a white, odorless powder composed of calcium and phosphate ions, occurring naturally in bones and minerals such as apatite. It is insoluble in water but soluble in acids.
physicalProperties: Calcium phosphate is a white, odorless powder composed of calcium and phosphate ions, occurring naturally in bones and minerals such as apatite. It is insoluble in water but soluble in acids.
safetyHandling: Non-toxic and biocompatible. Avoid inhaling dust and store dry to prevent caking.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 25 kg paper bags or fiber drums with PE liners. Store cool, dry, and tightly sealed.

name: Cobalt Carbonate
description: Cobalt carbonate is a pink to red powder insoluble in water but reactive with acids to form cobalt salts. It is a major precursor in cobalt refining.
physicalProperties: Cobalt carbonate is a pink to red powder insoluble in water but reactive with acids to form cobalt salts. It is a major precursor in cobalt refining.
safetyHandling: Toxic if inhaled or ingested; handle with gloves and local ventilation. Avoid dust accumulation.
tradeRegulatory: Delivered in 25 kg PE-lined bags or drums. Store cool, dry, and sealed.

name: Carob Protein
description: Carob protein is a plant-based protein extracted from Ceratonia siliqua seeds. It is rich in arginine and lysine and has a neutral flavor with excellent dispersibility.
physicalProperties: Carob protein is a plant-based protein extracted from Ceratonia siliqua seeds. It is rich in arginine and lysine and has a neutral flavor with excellent dispersibility.
safetyHandling: Non-toxic and allergen-free. Store in moisture-free environments to prevent microbial growth.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 20–25 kg kraft paper bags with inner PE liners. Store cool, dry, and sealed.

name: Hypophosphorous Acid
description: Hypophosphorous acid is a colorless, oily liquid and a powerful reducing agent. It is moderately strong, stable in solution, and soluble in water and alcohols.
physicalProperties: Hypophosphorous acid is a colorless, oily liquid and a powerful reducing agent. It is moderately strong, stable in solution, and soluble in water and alcohols.
safetyHandling: Corrosive and may release phosphine gas upon heating or contact with oxidizers. Use acid-resistant protective equipment and store under proper ventilation.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 25–250 kg HDPE drums or IBC tanks. Store cool, dry, and away from strong oxidizing agents and metals.

name: Histidine
description: Histidine is an essential amino acid appearing as a white crystalline powder with mild solubility in water. It plays a vital role in protein synthesis and enzyme function.
physicalProperties: Histidine is an essential amino acid appearing as a white crystalline powder with mild solubility in water. It plays a vital role in protein synthesis and enzyme function.
safetyHandling: Non-toxic and stable. Avoid exposure to humidity and direct sunlight to prevent degradation.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 25 kg PE-lined fiber drums or aluminum bags. Store cool, dry, and sealed.

name: Indole-3-Acetic Acid
description: Indole-3-acetic acid is a natural auxin plant hormone that regulates cell elongation and differentiation. It appears as a white crystalline powder soluble in organic solvents.
physicalProperties: Indole-3-acetic acid is a natural auxin plant hormone that regulates cell elongation and differentiation. It appears as a white crystalline powder soluble in organic solvents.
safetyHandling: Stable under normal handling; avoid exposure to light and air to prevent decomposition.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 1–25 kg aluminum foil bags or drums. Store cool, dark, and dry.

name: İnositol
description: Inositol is a cyclic polyol structurally similar to glucose, occurring naturally in fruits and grains. It is a white crystalline powder with a mild sweet taste.
physicalProperties: Inositol is a cyclic polyol structurally similar to glucose, occurring naturally in fruits and grains. It is a white crystalline powder with a mild sweet taste.
safetyHandling: Non-toxic and stable. Avoid moisture absorption and direct sunlight.
tradeRegulatory: Delivered in 25 kg paper bags or fiber drums with inner liners. Store cool, dry, and sealed.

name: Vitamin B6 Hydrochloride
description: Vitamin B6 hydrochloride, or pyridoxine hydrochloride, is a white crystalline powder with formula C8H12ClNO3 and molecular weight 205.64 g/mol. Density 1.28 g/cm³, melting point 205-212°C, highly soluble in water (220 g/L), acidic taste; form of vitamin B6.
physicalProperties: Vitamin B6 hydrochloride, or pyridoxine hydrochloride, is a white crystalline powder with formula C8H12ClNO3 and molecular weight 205.64 g/mol. Density 1.28 g/cm³, melting point 205-212°C, highly soluble in water (220 g/L), acidic taste; form of vitamin B6.
safetyHandling: Low toxicity, GRAS; high doses cause neuropathy. Irritates eyes/skin; avoid dust. Stable; use PPE, ventilate.
tradeRegulatory: In 25kg cartons with PE liners; store at room temperature per Fisher Scientific SDS.

name: Hydroxypropyl Betadex
description: Hydroxypropyl betadex is a modified cyclodextrin with enhanced aqueous solubility and inclusion capacity. It appears as a white crystalline powder.
physicalProperties: Hydroxypropyl betadex is a modified cyclodextrin with enhanced aqueous solubility and inclusion capacity. It appears as a white crystalline powder.
safetyHandling: Non-toxic and biocompatible. Avoid moisture absorption and exposure to high temperatures.
tradeRegulatory: Delivered in 10–25 kg PE-lined drums or foil bags. Store sealed, cool, and dry.

name: Hydrolyzed Fish Collagen
description: Hydrolyzed fish collagen is a low-molecular-weight peptide obtained by enzymatic hydrolysis of marine collagen. It dissolves readily in water and is highly bioavailable.
physicalProperties: Hydrolyzed fish collagen is a low-molecular-weight peptide obtained by enzymatic hydrolysis of marine collagen. It dissolves readily in water and is highly bioavailable.
safetyHandling: Non-toxic; store dry to prevent microbial contamination.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 10–25 kg foil-lined drums or vacuum-sealed pouches. Store cool, dry, and sealed.

name: Hydrolyzed Keratin
description: Hydrolyzed keratin is a protein hydrolysate derived from wool or feathers. It consists of short-chain peptides that penetrate hair and skin for repair and protection.
physicalProperties: Hydrolyzed keratin is a protein hydrolysate derived from wool or feathers. It consists of short-chain peptides that penetrate hair and skin for repair and protection.
safetyHandling: Non-toxic and safe for cosmetic use; avoid exposure to high humidity and direct sunlight.
tradeRegulatory: Delivered in 10–25 kg aluminum-lined drums or HDPE containers. Store cool, dry, and tightly sealed.

name: Hydrolyzed Bovine Collagen
description: Hydrolyzed bovine collagen is a protein based ingredient produced through controlled enzymatic hydrolysis of bovine collagen. It is supplied as a free flowing powder with neutral taste and good solubility. The product is valued for its functionality and consistency in nutrition, pharmaceutical and personal care formulations.
physicalProperties: Hydrolyzed bovine collagen is a protein based ingredient produced through controlled enzymatic hydrolysis of bovine collagen. It is supplied as a free flowing powder with neutral taste and good solubility. The product is valued for its functionality and consistency in nutrition, pharmaceutical and personal care formulations.
safetyHandling: Generally considered safe. May cause allergic reactions in sensitive individuals. Handle powder with PPE to avoid inhalation.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 20 or 25 kilogram bags or fibre drums with inner liners. Store cool and dry protected from moisture.

name: Vitamin B2 Riboflavin
description: Vitamin B2 riboflavin is a yellow-orange crystalline powder with formula C17H20N4O6 and molecular weight 376.36 g/mol. Density 1.65 g/cm³, melting point 280°C (dec), slightly soluble in water (0.066 g/L), bitter taste; water-soluble vitamin.
physicalProperties: Vitamin B2 riboflavin is a yellow-orange crystalline powder with formula C17H20N4O6 and molecular weight 376.36 g/mol. Density 1.65 g/cm³, melting point 280°C (dec), slightly soluble in water (0.066 g/L), bitter taste; water-soluble vitamin.
safetyHandling: Low toxicity, GRAS; may cause yellow urine. Irritates eyes; avoid dust. Stable but light-sensitive; use PPE.
tradeRegulatory: In 25kg drums with inner bags; store in dark, dry places per Fisher Scientific SDS.

name: Fava Bean Protein
description: Fava bean protein is a plant-derived protein isolate containing over 80% protein with high lysine content and functional emulsifying properties.
physicalProperties: Fava bean protein is a plant-derived protein isolate containing over 80% protein with high lysine content and functional emulsifying properties.
safetyHandling: Safe and allergen-free. Avoid moisture to prevent microbial growth.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 20–25 kg paper bags with PE liners. Store cool, dry, and sealed.

name: Phosphatidylcholine
description: Phosphatidylcholine is a phospholipid component of lecithin, typically derived from soy or sunflower. It forms bilayer membranes with excellent emulsification and biocompatibility.
physicalProperties: Phosphatidylcholine is a phospholipid component of lecithin, typically derived from soy or sunflower. It forms bilayer membranes with excellent emulsification and biocompatibility.
safetyHandling: Non-toxic and stable; avoid heat and light to prevent oxidation.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 5–25 kg aluminum bags or drums. Store sealed, cool, and protected from air and moisture.

name: Phosphorus Pentasulfide
description: Phosphorus pentasulfide is a yellow-green solid used as a sulfurizing and chlorinating reagent. It releases hydrogen sulfide upon hydrolysis.
physicalProperties: Phosphorus pentasulfide is a yellow-green solid used as a sulfurizing and chlorinating reagent. It releases hydrogen sulfide upon hydrolysis.
safetyHandling: Toxic and flammable; reacts violently with water and acids. Handle under inert atmosphere with protective gear.
tradeRegulatory: Delivered in 25 kg drums or steel containers. Store dry, sealed, and away from moisture.

name: Phthalic Anhydride
description: Phthalic anhydride is a white crystalline compound produced by the oxidation of o-xylene or naphthalene. It is a key intermediate for plasticizers and resins.
physicalProperties: Phthalic anhydride is a white crystalline compound produced by the oxidation of o-xylene or naphthalene. It is a key intermediate for plasticizers and resins.
safetyHandling: Irritating to eyes and respiratory tract; may cause sensitization. Avoid heating and dust accumulation.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 25 kg bags or molten in tank trucks. Store cool, dry, and sealed from moisture.

name: Gamma Aminobutyric Acid (GABA)
description: GABA is a non-protein amino acid functioning as a primary inhibitory neurotransmitter in mammals. It is a white, water-soluble crystalline powder produced by microbial fermentation.
physicalProperties: GABA is a non-protein amino acid functioning as a primary inhibitory neurotransmitter in mammals. It is a white, water-soluble crystalline powder produced by microbial fermentation.
safetyHandling: Non-toxic and stable. Avoid prolonged heat or moisture to prevent degradation.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 25 kg aluminum foil bags or fiber drums. Store in a cool, dry, and shaded environment.

name: Glabridin
description: Glabridin is an isoflavan isolated from Glycyrrhiza glabra (licorice root). It appears as a pale yellow powder with potent antioxidant and depigmenting activity.
physicalProperties: Glabridin is an isoflavan isolated from Glycyrrhiza glabra (licorice root). It appears as a pale yellow powder with potent antioxidant and depigmenting activity.
safetyHandling: Safe at cosmetic levels; handle away from direct light and oxygen to preserve stability.
tradeRegulatory: Delivered in 1–25 kg vacuum-sealed foil bags or aluminum drums. Store cool, dark, and dry.

name: Glutamic Acid
description: Glutamic acid is a non-essential amino acid and a key neurotransmitter precursor. It occurs as white crystals or powder with acidic taste.
physicalProperties: Glutamic acid is a non-essential amino acid and a key neurotransmitter precursor. It occurs as white crystals or powder with acidic taste.
safetyHandling: Non-toxic under normal use; dust may cause mild irritation. Handle under ventilation and keep dry.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 25 kg PE-lined bags. Store sealed, cool, and dry.

name: Egg White Powder
description: Egg white powder, or dried albumin from chicken eggs, is a white to off-white powder with high protein content (80-90%), formula variable (mainly ovalbumin C723H1125N183O202S5). Density 0.5-0.7 g/cm³, soluble in water forming foams, hygroscopic; produced by spray-drying pasteurized egg whites, used as protein source in food and lab.
physicalProperties: Egg white powder, or dried albumin from chicken eggs, is a white to off-white powder with high protein content (80-90%), formula variable (mainly ovalbumin C723H1125N183O202S5). Density 0.5-0.7 g/cm³, soluble in water forming foams, hygroscopic; produced by spray-drying pasteurized egg whites, used as protein source in food and lab.
safetyHandling: May cause allergies in sensitive people; dust irritates eyes and respiratory. Low toxicity but GRAS; stable. Use PPE; no major risks but avoid in egg allergies.
tradeRegulatory: Packaged in 25kg kraft paper bags with moisture barriers or fiber drums; store in dry warehouses per Sigma-Aldrich SDS.

name: Vitamin K2 Menakinon MK-7
description: Vitamin K2 MK-7, or menaquinone-7, is a yellow crystalline powder with formula C46H64O2 and molecular weight 649.0 g/mol. Slightly soluble in water, soluble in organics; melting point around 54°C; form of vitamin K with long side chain, produced by fermentation.
physicalProperties: Vitamin K2 MK-7, or menaquinone-7, is a yellow crystalline powder with formula C46H64O2 and molecular weight 649.0 g/mol. Slightly soluble in water, soluble in organics; melting point around 54°C; form of vitamin K with long side chain, produced by fermentation.
safetyHandling: Low toxicity, GRAS; may cause mild gastrointestinal upset in high doses. Avoid with anticoagulants; stable but light-sensitive. Use PPE for dust; no major hazards but monitor interactions.
tradeRegulatory: Packaged in 25kg cartons with inner aluminum foil bags for light protection; store at -20°C per Sigma-Aldrich guidelines.

name: Vitamin E Alpha-Tocopherol
description: Vitamin E alpha-tocopherol is a light yellow oily liquid or powder with formula C29H50O2 and molecular weight 430.71 g/mol. Density 0.95 g/cm³, boiling point 200°C (decomposes), soluble in fats and organics, insoluble in water; antioxidant vitamin.
physicalProperties: Vitamin E alpha-tocopherol is a light yellow oily liquid or powder with formula C29H50O2 and molecular weight 430.71 g/mol. Density 0.95 g/cm³, boiling point 200°C (decomposes), soluble in fats and organics, insoluble in water; antioxidant vitamin.
safetyHandling: Low toxicity, GRAS; may cause skin irritation or gastrointestinal upset in high doses. Combustible; avoid strong oxidizers. Use PPE; stable but oxidizes in air.
tradeRegulatory: In 25kg drums with nitrogen flushing for oxidation prevention; store in cool, dark places per ECHA recommendations.

name: Dioctyl Adipate
description: Dioctyl adipate (C₂₂H₄₂O₄) is a light-colored, oily liquid used as a low-temperature plasticizer. It provides flexibility, durability, and weather resistance in polymer systems.
physicalProperties: Dioctyl adipate (C₂₂H₄₂O₄) is a light-colored, oily liquid used as a low-temperature plasticizer. It provides flexibility, durability, and weather resistance in polymer systems.
safetyHandling: Low toxicity and biodegradable. Avoid high heat and direct sunlight. Handle with clean, dry equipment.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 200 kg steel drums or IBC tanks. Store sealed, cool, and away from oxidizing materials.

name: Dioctyl Fumarate
description: Dioctyl fumarate, also known as bis(2-ethylhexyl) fumarate, is a colorless to pale yellow liquid with formula C20H36O4 and molecular weight 340.50 g/mol. Density 0.94 g/cm³, boiling point 211-220°C at 10 mmHg, flash point >110°C, refractive index 1.450-1.452. Insoluble in water, soluble in organic solvents; odorless, stable under normal conditions, produced by esterification of fumaric acid with 2-ethylhexanol; used as plasticizer in polymers.
physicalProperties: Dioctyl fumarate, also known as bis(2-ethylhexyl) fumarate, is a colorless to pale yellow liquid with formula C20H36O4 and molecular weight 340.50 g/mol. Density 0.94 g/cm³, boiling point 211-220°C at 10 mmHg, flash point >110°C, refractive index 1.450-1.452. Insoluble in water, soluble in organic solvents; odorless, stable under normal conditions, produced by esterification of fumaric acid with 2-ethylhexanol; used as plasticizer in polymers.
safetyHandling: Low toxicity by ingestion and skin contact; mild irritant to eyes, skin, and mucous membranes. Combustible when heated; avoid oxidizing materials. Stable; no major hazards but use PPE, ventilate; monitor for skin sensitization in prolonged exposure.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 200kg polyethylene drums or 25kg plastic pails; store in cool, dry, ventilated areas away from ignition sources per ChemicalBook MSDS.

name: Dioctyl Maleate
description: Dioctyl maleate, or bis(2-ethylhexyl) maleate, is a colorless liquid with formula C20H36O4 and molecular weight 340.50 g/mol. Density 0.94 g/cm³, boiling point 211-220°C, flash point >110°C, refractive index 1.450. Insoluble in water, soluble in organics; odorless, used as plasticizer and monomer in resins.
physicalProperties: Dioctyl maleate, or bis(2-ethylhexyl) maleate, is a colorless liquid with formula C20H36O4 and molecular weight 340.50 g/mol. Density 0.94 g/cm³, boiling point 211-220°C, flash point >110°C, refractive index 1.450. Insoluble in water, soluble in organics; odorless, used as plasticizer and monomer in resins.
safetyHandling: Low toxicity; irritant to skin and eyes. Combustible; avoid strong oxidizers. Stable; use PPE, ventilate; no major hazards but monitor for irritation.
tradeRegulatory: Packaged in 200kg steel drums with epoxy lining; store in cool, dry areas per ChemicalBook product details.

name: DL-Methionine
description: DL-Methionine is a white crystalline powder with formula C5H11NO2S and molecular weight 149.21 g/mol. Density 1.34 g/cm³, melting point 281°C (decomposes), soluble in water (3.4 g/100mL at 25°C), slightly soluble in ethanol; essential amino acid, obtained by chemical synthesis, used in nutrition.
physicalProperties: DL-Methionine is a white crystalline powder with formula C5H11NO2S and molecular weight 149.21 g/mol. Density 1.34 g/cm³, melting point 281°C (decomposes), soluble in water (3.4 g/100mL at 25°C), slightly soluble in ethanol; essential amino acid, obtained by chemical synthesis, used in nutrition.
safetyHandling: Low toxicity, GRAS; high doses may cause nausea or hyperactivity. Irritates eyes/skin; avoid dust. Stable; use PPE, ventilate; monitor for sulfur sensitivity.
tradeRegulatory: Packaged in 25kg multi-wall paper bags or 1000kg big bags; store in dry, ventilated warehouses per Sigma-Aldrich FCC specs.

name: Zinc Acetate Dihydrate
description: Zinc acetate dihydrate (Zn(CH₃COO)₂·2H₂O) is a colorless crystalline salt used as a source of zinc ions and catalyst. It has mild antimicrobial and astringent properties.
physicalProperties: Zinc acetate dihydrate (Zn(CH₃COO)₂·2H₂O) is a colorless crystalline salt used as a source of zinc ions and catalyst. It has mild antimicrobial and astringent properties.
safetyHandling: Low toxicity but mildly irritating. Avoid dust formation and contact with acids or moisture.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 25 kg PE-lined bags or fiber drums. Store cool, dry, and tightly closed to prevent hydrolysis.

name: Zinc Phosphate
description: Zinc phosphate (Zn₃(PO₄)₂) is an inorganic white powder known for its superior corrosion resistance and strong adhesion to metal substrates. It forms insoluble, crystalline coatings that improve the durability of paints and primers.
physicalProperties: Zinc phosphate (Zn₃(PO₄)₂) is an inorganic white powder known for its superior corrosion resistance and strong adhesion to metal substrates. It forms insoluble, crystalline coatings that improve the durability of paints and primers.
safetyHandling: Low solubility and toxicity; dust may irritate eyes and respiratory tract. Avoid inhalation and store in dry conditions to prevent clumping.
tradeRegulatory: Delivered in 25 kg polyethylene-lined paper bags or drums. Store in a cool, dry, and well-ventilated area away from acids.

name: Zinc Nitrate Hexahydrate
description: Zinc nitrate hexahydrate (Zn(NO₃)₂·6H₂O) is a colorless, crystalline, and highly soluble salt with strong oxidizing properties. It releases zinc ions readily, making it valuable in catalyst preparation and ceramics.
physicalProperties: Zinc nitrate hexahydrate (Zn(NO₃)₂·6H₂O) is a colorless, crystalline, and highly soluble salt with strong oxidizing properties. It releases zinc ions readily, making it valuable in catalyst preparation and ceramics.
safetyHandling: An oxidizing compound that intensifies combustion with organics. Handle with care under dry, controlled conditions. Avoid heat and contamination.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 25 kg plastic-lined drums or PE bags. Store sealed, cool, and dry away from combustible materials.

name: Zinc Selenite
description: Zinc selenite (ZnSeO₃) is an inorganic compound used as a trace mineral source and semiconductor precursor. It forms white, fine crystalline powder soluble in acids but not in water.
physicalProperties: Zinc selenite (ZnSeO₃) is an inorganic compound used as a trace mineral source and semiconductor precursor. It forms white, fine crystalline powder soluble in acids but not in water.
safetyHandling: Toxic in high doses; avoid ingestion or inhalation. Use with appropriate PPE and ventilation. Environmental releases should be prevented.
tradeRegulatory: Delivered in 25 kg PE-lined drums or kraft bags. Store dry, sealed, and away from oxidizing agents.

name: Zinc Sulfate Heptahydrate
description: Zinc sulfate heptahydrate (ZnSO₄·7H₂O) is a transparent crystalline compound serving as a key zinc source in agriculture, feed, and industrial chemistry. It dissolves easily in water, providing bioavailable zinc ions.
physicalProperties: Zinc sulfate heptahydrate (ZnSO₄·7H₂O) is a transparent crystalline compound serving as a key zinc source in agriculture, feed, and industrial chemistry. It dissolves easily in water, providing bioavailable zinc ions.
safetyHandling: Harmful if swallowed; toxic to aquatic life. Avoid dust formation and direct skin contact. Handle in ventilated areas.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 25–50 kg polyethylene-lined bags. Store cool, dry, and away from acids or bases.

name: Zinc Sulfate Monohydrate
description: Zinc sulfate monohydrate (ZnSO₄·H₂O) is a white crystalline compound used for similar applications as the heptahydrate but offering higher zinc content per weight.
physicalProperties: Zinc sulfate monohydrate (ZnSO₄·H₂O) is a white crystalline compound used for similar applications as the heptahydrate but offering higher zinc content per weight.
safetyHandling: Toxic if ingested or inhaled in large amounts. Avoid exposure to heat and humidity. Use gloves and respiratory protection during handling.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 25–50 kg PE-lined bags or big bags. Store sealed, cool, and dry.

name: D-Glucosamine Hydrochloride
description: D-glucosamine hydrochloride (C₆H₁₃NO₅·HCl) is an amino sugar derived from chitin and used as a joint-support compound. It forms colorless crystals readily soluble in water.
physicalProperties: D-glucosamine hydrochloride (C₆H₁₃NO₅·HCl) is an amino sugar derived from chitin and used as a joint-support compound. It forms colorless crystals readily soluble in water.
safetyHandling: Non-toxic and well-tolerated; avoid moisture and high temperature during storage to prevent degradation.
tradeRegulatory: Delivered in 25 kg fiber drums or PE-lined bags. Store cool, dry, and sealed to preserve purity.

name: Iron Nitrate
description: Iron(III) nitrate nonahydrate is a dark purple, crystalline oxidizing salt. It provides soluble iron ions for catalysis, dyeing, and pigment applications.
physicalProperties: Iron(III) nitrate nonahydrate is a dark purple, crystalline oxidizing salt. It provides soluble iron ions for catalysis, dyeing, and pigment applications.
safetyHandling: Strong oxidizer; avoid contact with organics and heat. Corrosive to metals and tissue—use acid-resistant PPE.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 25 kg polyethylene-lined drums or bags. Store in cool, dry, and segregated facilities away from combustibles.

name: Dibutyl Maleate
description: Dibutyl maleate (C₁₂H₂₀O₄) is a colorless liquid ester used as a plasticizer and copolymer monomer. It offers flexibility and adhesion in various polymer systems.
physicalProperties: Dibutyl maleate (C₁₂H₂₀O₄) is a colorless liquid ester used as a plasticizer and copolymer monomer. It offers flexibility and adhesion in various polymer systems.
safetyHandling: Low toxicity; avoid contact with oxidizers and prolonged heat exposure.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 200 kg drums or IBC tanks. Store in a cool, ventilated area, tightly sealed.

name: Copper Nitrate
description: Copper nitrate trihydrate (Cu(NO₃)₂·3H₂O) is a blue crystalline oxidizing salt used for chemical synthesis and metal surface finishing. It decomposes on heating to produce nitrogen oxides and copper oxide.
physicalProperties: Copper nitrate trihydrate (Cu(NO₃)₂·3H₂O) is a blue crystalline oxidizing salt used for chemical synthesis and metal surface finishing. It decomposes on heating to produce nitrogen oxides and copper oxide.
safetyHandling: An oxidizer and irritant; avoid contact with organics and heat sources. Toxic if swallowed or inhaled. Handle under dry, ventilated conditions.
tradeRegulatory: 25 kg polyethylene-lined fiber drums. Store in cool, dry areas away from flammable materials and reducing agents.

name: Copper Sulfate Pentahydrate
description: Copper sulfate pentahydrate (CuSO₄·5H₂O) is a bright blue crystalline compound widely used in agriculture, electroplating, and chemistry. It readily dissolves in water to yield copper ions with strong biocidal activity.
physicalProperties: Copper sulfate pentahydrate (CuSO₄·5H₂O) is a bright blue crystalline compound widely used in agriculture, electroplating, and chemistry. It readily dissolves in water to yield copper ions with strong biocidal activity.
safetyHandling: Toxic if ingested and dangerous to aquatic life. Avoid skin contact and inhalation of dust. Use protective clothing and segregate storage from acids.
tradeRegulatory: 25–50 kg polyethylene-lined bags or big bags. Store sealed, cool, and dry to prevent efflorescence and clumping.

name: Pea Protein
description: Pea protein is a plant-based protein isolate derived from yellow peas (Pisum sativum). It contains a balanced amino-acid profile and high digestibility, making it a sustainable alternative to animal proteins.
physicalProperties: Pea protein is a plant-based protein isolate derived from yellow peas (Pisum sativum). It contains a balanced amino-acid profile and high digestibility, making it a sustainable alternative to animal proteins.
safetyHandling: Non-allergenic and safe for food use. Avoid moisture to prevent microbial growth. Handle with standard food-grade hygiene protocols.
tradeRegulatory: Delivered in 20–25 kg multiwall paper bags with PE liners. Store in cool, dry warehouses away from direct sunlight.

name: Wheat Protein 50%
description: Wheat protein concentrate contains approximately 50 % protein by weight and is rich in glutamine and branched-chain amino acids. It is derived from wheat gluten via wet fractionation and drying.
physicalProperties: Wheat protein concentrate contains approximately 50 % protein by weight and is rich in glutamine and branched-chain amino acids. It is derived from wheat gluten via wet fractionation and drying.
safetyHandling: Food-grade and non-toxic; store dry to avoid microbial growth and clumping. Handle powders with dust control measures.
tradeRegulatory: 20–25 kg bags or fiber drums with PE liners. Store cool, dry, and sealed.

name: Capsicum Oleoresin
description: Capsicum oleoresin is a concentrated extract from chili peppers containing capsaicinoids and carotenoids. It provides pungency, color, and antioxidant properties.
physicalProperties: Capsicum oleoresin is a concentrated extract from chili peppers containing capsaicinoids and carotenoids. It provides pungency, color, and antioxidant properties.
safetyHandling: Irritant to skin, eyes, and mucous membranes. Handle under ventilation with protective gear. Avoid direct inhalation or contact.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 1–25 kg aluminum or HDPE containers. Store cool, dark, and tightly sealed to prevent oxidation.

name: Cassia Gum
otherNames: Cassia Obtusifolia Gum, Cassia Tora Powder
description: Cassia gum is a high-molecular-weight galactomannan obtained from the endosperm of Cassia tora seeds. It functions as a thickener, emulsifier, and stabilizer.
physicalProperties: Cassia gum is a high-molecular-weight galactomannan obtained from the endosperm of Cassia tora seeds. It functions as a thickener, emulsifier, and stabilizer.
safetyHandling: Non-toxic and biodegradable. Avoid moisture exposure to preserve gelling capacity. Handle as a food-grade powder under hygienic conditions.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 25 kg kraft paper bags with PE liners. Store in cool, dry areas away from humidity.

name: Zinc Acrylate
description: Zinc acrylate (C₆H₆O₄Zn) is a zinc salt of acrylic acid used as a crosslinking agent and adhesion promoter. It appears as a white powder or granule with high reactivity under polymerization conditions.
physicalProperties: Zinc acrylate (C₆H₆O₄Zn) is a zinc salt of acrylic acid used as a crosslinking agent and adhesion promoter. It appears as a white powder or granule with high reactivity under polymerization conditions.
safetyHandling: Irritating to eyes and skin; use gloves and goggles. Avoid exposure to UV light and high temperatures.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 25 kg polyethylene-lined drums or bags. Store in cool, dry, and shaded conditions.

name: Copper Acetate
description: Copper acetate monohydrate (Cu(CH₃COO)₂·H₂O) is a dark blue-green crystalline salt known for its oxidizing and catalytic behavior. It dissolves in water and alcohol to form deep blue solutions that readily participate in redox reactions.
physicalProperties: Copper acetate monohydrate (Cu(CH₃COO)₂·H₂O) is a dark blue-green crystalline salt known for its oxidizing and catalytic behavior. It dissolves in water and alcohol to form deep blue solutions that readily participate in redox reactions.
safetyHandling: Harmful if ingested or inhaled; toxic to aquatic organisms. Use respiratory and skin protection and prevent environmental release.
tradeRegulatory: Packed in 25 kg polyethylene-lined drums or bags. Store in cool, dry conditions away from acids and reducing agents.

name: Copper Hydroxide
description: Copper hydroxide (Cu(OH)₂) is a fine blue powder with strong fungicidal properties and alkaline reactivity. It acts as a source of slow-release copper ions in agrochemical and industrial processes.
physicalProperties: Copper hydroxide (Cu(OH)₂) is a fine blue powder with strong fungicidal properties and alkaline reactivity. It acts as a source of slow-release copper ions in agrochemical and industrial processes.
safetyHandling: Toxic if ingested; causes eye and skin irritation. Avoid dust generation and contact with acids that release heat and toxic vapors.
tradeRegulatory: Delivered in 25–50 kg PE-lined bags or fiber drums. Store dry and sealed, away from moisture and incompatible materials.

name: Copper Carbonate
description: A high-quality, fine green powder ideal for use in catalysts, pigments, wood preservatives, and agricultural formulations.
physicalProperties: A high-quality, fine green powder ideal for use in catalysts, pigments, wood preservatives, and agricultural formulations.
safetyHandling: Harmful if swallowed or inhaled; avoid dust exposure and environmental release. Wear gloves, mask, and eye protection.
tradeRegulatory: 25 kg polyethylene-lined bags or fiber drums. Store cool and dry, protected from acids and moisture.

name: Copper Chloride
description: Copper chloride (CuCl₂) is a greenish crystalline salt with high solubility and oxidizing capacity. It serves as an intermediate for chlorinated copper compounds and as a catalyst in organic reactions.
physicalProperties: Copper chloride (CuCl₂) is a greenish crystalline salt with high solubility and oxidizing capacity. It serves as an intermediate for chlorinated copper compounds and as a catalyst in organic reactions.
safetyHandling: Corrosive and toxic if inhaled or ingested; reacts vigorously with metals and reducing agents. Use full protective equipment and local ventilation.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 25 kg plastic-lined bags or drums. Store cool, dry, and tightly sealed, away from heat and organics.

name: Amoxicillin
description: Amoxicillin is a semi-synthetic beta-lactam antibiotic derived from penicillin. It is a broad-spectrum antibacterial active against Gram-positive and certain Gram-negative bacteria.
physicalProperties: Amoxicillin is a semi-synthetic beta-lactam antibiotic derived from penicillin. It is a broad-spectrum antibacterial active against Gram-positive and certain Gram-negative bacteria.
safetyHandling: Allergic reactions possible in penicillin-sensitive individuals. Avoid dust formation during handling; pharmaceutical GMP environments required.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied as sterile powder in aluminum-sealed drums or sachets. Store cool, dry, and protected from light.

name: Ammonium Alginate
description: Ammonium alginate is the ammonium salt of alginic acid, derived from brown seaweed polysaccharides. It provides thickening, gelling, and film-forming properties in water-based systems.
physicalProperties: Ammonium alginate is the ammonium salt of alginic acid, derived from brown seaweed polysaccharides. It provides thickening, gelling, and film-forming properties in water-based systems.
safetyHandling: Low toxicity; handle powders to minimize inhalable dust. Avoid prolonged exposure to moisture.
tradeRegulatory: 25 kg kraft bags with inner polyethylene liners. Store sealed, cool, and dry to maintain viscosity.

name: Ammonium Dimolybdate
description: Ammonium dimolybdate [(NH₄)₂Mo₂O₇] is a white crystalline compound used as a precursor for molybdenum oxides and catalysts.
physicalProperties: Ammonium dimolybdate [(NH₄)₂Mo₂O₇] is a white crystalline compound used as a precursor for molybdenum oxides and catalysts.
safetyHandling: Low toxicity but may cause irritation if inhaled. Avoid dust generation and contact with acids.
tradeRegulatory: 25 kg polyethylene-lined fiber drums or bags. Store sealed and dry, away from moisture and reducing agents.

name: Ammonium Heptamolybdate
description: Ammonium heptamolybdate tetrahydrate [(NH₄)₆Mo₇O₂₄·4H₂O] is a white crystalline compound widely used as a source of molybdenum in industrial and laboratory applications. It dissolves readily in water to provide molybdate ions for catalysis and corrosion inhibition.
physicalProperties: Ammonium heptamolybdate tetrahydrate [(NH₄)₆Mo₇O₂₄·4H₂O] is a white crystalline compound widely used as a source of molybdenum in industrial and laboratory applications. It dissolves readily in water to provide molybdate ions for catalysis and corrosion inhibition.
safetyHandling: Low acute toxicity but may cause irritation to eyes and respiratory tract. Avoid generation of airborne dust and direct skin contact. Environmental discharge should be minimized due to metal ion content.
tradeRegulatory: 25 kg PE-lined fiber drums or kraft bags. Store sealed, cool, and dry, protected from moisture and acids.

name: Ammonium Calcium Alginate
description: Ammonium calcium alginate is a mixed salt of alginic acid produced from brown algae. It combines the gelling capacity of calcium alginate with the solubility of ammonium alginate, offering balanced stability in aqueous systems.
physicalProperties: Ammonium calcium alginate is a mixed salt of alginic acid produced from brown algae. It combines the gelling capacity of calcium alginate with the solubility of ammonium alginate, offering balanced stability in aqueous systems.
safetyHandling: Non-toxic and biocompatible; handled as an organic powder with dust control measures. Avoid prolonged exposure to moisture to prevent loss of functionality.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 20–25 kg paper bags with inner PE liners. Store in cool, dry areas protected from light and humidity.

name: Instant BCAA
description: Instant BCAA is a water-dispersible blend of leucine, isoleucine, and valine in a 2:1:1 or 4:1:1 ratio, often instantized with lecithin. It appears as a white to off-white free-flowing powder.
physicalProperties: Instant BCAA is a water-dispersible blend of leucine, isoleucine, and valine in a 2:1:1 or 4:1:1 ratio, often instantized with lecithin. It appears as a white to off-white free-flowing powder.
safetyHandling: Non-toxic and safe; store dry to prevent clumping and degradation.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 10–25 kg aluminum foil bags or drums. Store sealed, cool, and dry.

name: Apocarotenal
description: Apocarotenal (C₃₀H₄₀O) is an orange-red carotenoid used as a natural colorant and antioxidant. It provides stable pigmentation in fat-based and aqueous dispersions while maintaining high color strength.
physicalProperties: Apocarotenal (C₃₀H₄₀O) is an orange-red carotenoid used as a natural colorant and antioxidant. It provides stable pigmentation in fat-based and aqueous dispersions while maintaining high color strength.
safetyHandling: Considered safe under approved food additive limits. Sensitive to oxygen and light; handle under an inert atmosphere if possible.
tradeRegulatory: Delivered in stabilized beadlets, emulsions, or powders in nitrogen-flushed containers. Store in cool, dark, and dry conditions to prevent oxidation.

name: Arachidonic Acid
description: Arachidonic acid (C₂₀H₃₂O₂) is a polyunsaturated omega-6 fatty acid essential in cell signaling and prostaglandin synthesis. Industrially, it is obtained from fungal or algal fermentation.
physicalProperties: Arachidonic acid (C₂₀H₃₂O₂) is a polyunsaturated omega-6 fatty acid essential in cell signaling and prostaglandin synthesis. Industrially, it is obtained from fungal or algal fermentation.
safetyHandling: Generally recognized as safe at nutritional concentrations. Sensitive to oxidation; nitrogen blanketing and antioxidants recommended.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied as oil or encapsulated powder in aluminum containers or nitrogen-sealed drums. Store cool, dark, and oxygen-free.

name: Acerola Extract
description: Acerola extract is derived from the fruit of Malpighia emarginata and is exceptionally rich in natural vitamin C and polyphenols. It provides strong antioxidant and skin-brightening benefits.
physicalProperties: Acerola extract is derived from the fruit of Malpighia emarginata and is exceptionally rich in natural vitamin C and polyphenols. It provides strong antioxidant and skin-brightening benefits.
safetyHandling: Naturally safe; store away from heat and moisture to preserve ascorbic acid content. Handle gently to prevent oxidation.
tradeRegulatory: Powdered extract supplied in 10–25 kg foil-lined drums. Store cool, dry, and away from direct sunlight.

name: Alpha Linoleic Acid
description: Alpha-linolenic acid is a plant-derived omega-3 ingredient valued in nutrition, functional foods, and personal care. Offered as a pale oil or concentrated ester/triglyceride form, ALA supports health-focused formulations and is sourced from established global producers ensuring consistency, purity, and oxidative stability.
physicalProperties: Alpha-linolenic acid is a plant-derived omega-3 ingredient valued in nutrition, functional foods, and personal care. Offered as a pale oil or concentrated ester/triglyceride form, ALA supports health-focused formulations and is sourced from established global producers ensuring consistency, purity, and oxidative stability.
safetyHandling: Generally recognised as safe with low toxicity. Oxidation can occur if improperly stored, forming off-flavours or peroxides. May cause digestive discomfort at excessive doses. Handle concentrates with standard PPE and maintain nitrogen protection when possible.
tradeRegulatory: Typically packed in 25 kg aluminium containers or 190 kg nitrogen-flushed steel drums. Store cool and protected from light to maintain freshness and stability.

name: Ammonium Nitrate
description: Ammonium nitrate (NH₄NO₃) is a white, crystalline oxidizing salt valued for its high nitrogen content and reactivity. It serves as both a fertilizer and a key oxidizer in explosives.
physicalProperties: Ammonium nitrate (NH₄NO₃) is a white, crystalline oxidizing salt valued for its high nitrogen content and reactivity. It serves as both a fertilizer and a key oxidizer in explosives.
safetyHandling: Strong oxidizer that may detonate under confinement or contamination. Avoid exposure to heat, fuel oils, or reducing agents. Storage requires strict temperature and segregation controls.
tradeRegulatory: Packed in 25–50 kg anti-caking, moisture-resistant bags. Store in approved oxidizer facilities away from combustibles and ignition sources.

name: 1-(1-Naphthylmethyl) Quinolinium Chloride
description: This compound is a quaternary ammonium salt with a stable crystalline structure and antimicrobial activity. It is light-sensitive and soluble in polar solvents.
physicalProperties: This compound is a quaternary ammonium salt with a stable crystalline structure and antimicrobial activity. It is light-sensitive and soluble in polar solvents.
safetyHandling: Toxic and irritant; avoid inhalation and direct contact. Store under inert atmosphere, away from light.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 1–5 kg amber glass bottles or 25 kg drums. Store cool, dry, and sealed.

name: Alkyl Imidazolines
description: Alkyl imidazolines are cyclic amine surfactants produced by the reaction of fatty acids with ethylenediamine. They offer amphiphilic properties and corrosion inhibition in aqueous and oil-based systems.
physicalProperties: Alkyl imidazolines are cyclic amine surfactants produced by the reaction of fatty acids with ethylenediamine. They offer amphiphilic properties and corrosion inhibition in aqueous and oil-based systems.
safetyHandling: Can cause irritation upon contact with skin or eyes. Avoid prolonged exposure and ensure appropriate ventilation during blending.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 200 kg drums or IBC tanks as viscous liquids. Store between 10–30 °C in dry, closed containers away from oxidizers.

name: 4-Carboxyphenylboronic Acid
description: 4-Carboxyphenylboronic acid is a white crystalline compound containing both carboxyl and boronic functional groups. It serves as a versatile intermediate for Suzuki coupling reactions.
physicalProperties: 4-Carboxyphenylboronic acid is a white crystalline compound containing both carboxyl and boronic functional groups. It serves as a versatile intermediate for Suzuki coupling reactions.
safetyHandling: Stable under dry conditions; may irritate skin and eyes. Handle with gloves and eye protection.
tradeRegulatory: Delivered in 1–25 kg aluminum foil bags or glass bottles. Store cool, dry, and sealed.

name: Alpha Olefin Sulfonate
description: Alpha Olefin Sulfonate (C₁₂–C₁₆ AOS) is an anionic surfactant derived from linear alpha olefins. It offers excellent foaming, detergency, and biodegradability, making it a preferred alternative to traditional sulfates.
physicalProperties: Alpha Olefin Sulfonate (C₁₂–C₁₆ AOS) is an anionic surfactant derived from linear alpha olefins. It offers excellent foaming, detergency, and biodegradability, making it a preferred alternative to traditional sulfates.
safetyHandling: Low acute toxicity but may cause skin or eye irritation in concentrated form. Avoid aerosol formation during mixing.
tradeRegulatory: Available in 200 kg drums or IBC tanks as 35–40% active solutions. Store at ambient temperature, sealed and protected from freezing.

name: Amyl Salicylate
description: Amyl salicylate (C₁₂H₁₆O₃) is an ester with a floral, sweet odor widely used as a fragrance intermediate. It is stable, colorless, and soluble in most perfumery solvents.
physicalProperties: Amyl salicylate (C₁₂H₁₆O₃) is an ester with a floral, sweet odor widely used as a fragrance intermediate. It is stable, colorless, and soluble in most perfumery solvents.
safetyHandling: Low toxicity but may cause mild irritation on prolonged contact. Avoid oxidation and high-temperature storage.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 25 kg aluminum or HDPE drums. Store sealed in cool, dark, ventilated conditions.

name: Spirulina
description: Spirulina is a nutrient-dense blue-green microalgae powder known for its high protein content, natural pigments, and broad nutraceutical value. Produced through controlled cultivation and gentle drying, it serves as a premium ingredient in health, food, and feed formulations.
physicalProperties: Spirulina is a nutrient-dense blue-green microalgae powder known for its high protein content, natural pigments, and broad nutraceutical value. Produced through controlled cultivation and gentle drying, it serves as a premium ingredient in health, food, and feed formulations.
safetyHandling: Generally safe, though quality depends on contamination-free cultivation. Poor sourcing may lead to microcystin or heavy-metal presence. Dust may irritate. Use PPE and procure from certified suppliers.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 25 kg kraft bags or drums with liners. Store in cool, dry, light-protected environments to preserve pigment and nutrient stability.

name: Acid Green
description: Acid Green refers to a group of anionic dyes that deliver bright green shades for textile, leather, and paper coloration. These dyes exhibit high solubility and excellent affinity toward protein and polyamide fibers, offering durable, vivid results.
physicalProperties: Acid Green refers to a group of anionic dyes that deliver bright green shades for textile, leather, and paper coloration. These dyes exhibit high solubility and excellent affinity toward protein and polyamide fibers, offering durable, vivid results.
safetyHandling: Powdered dye may irritate skin and respiratory tract. Avoid direct contact and airborne dust through localized extraction. Wastewater containing dye residues must be treated in accordance with environmental regulations to prevent coloration of effluents.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 25 kg fiber drums or multi-wall paper bags lined with polyethylene. Store in a cool, dry, well-ventilated area away from sunlight and moisture.

name: Heavy Soda Ash
description: Heavy soda ash is a high-density grade of sodium carbonate tailored for industrial processes requiring reduced dusting, improved flow, and higher bulk handling efficiency. Its consistent purity makes it a preferred raw material for large-scale formulation and production operations.
physicalProperties: Heavy soda ash is a high-density grade of sodium carbonate tailored for industrial processes requiring reduced dusting, improved flow, and higher bulk handling efficiency. Its consistent purity makes it a preferred raw material for large-scale formulation and production operations.
safetyHandling: Irritant to eyes, skin, and respiratory system. Use dust control and PPE. Stable under normal conditions but reacts strongly with acids, releasing CO₂. Maintain dry storage to avoid caking.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 50 kg sacks or 1000 kg FIBCs with PE liners. Store on pallets in dry, covered areas with minimal humidity exposure.

name: Aluminum Fluoride
description: Aluminum fluoride is a white inorganic compound supplied as a fine powder or granular material for industrial use. It is widely used in metallurgical and chemical processes due to its ability to modify melting behaviour and improve process efficiency. The product is valued for its high purity, stable composition and consistent performance in large scale operations.
