description: Ammonium bifluoride (NH₄HF₂) is a crystalline, acidic fluoride salt used where controlled release of hydrogen fluoride is required. Its strong reactivity toward oxides and silicates makes it indispensable in surface finishing industries.
physicalProperties: Ammonium bifluoride (NH₄HF₂) is a crystalline, acidic fluoride salt used where controlled release of hydrogen fluoride is required. Its strong reactivity toward oxides and silicates makes it indispensable in surface finishing industries.
safetyHandling: Highly corrosive and toxic; contact causes severe burns and systemic fluoride poisoning. Generates HF vapors in moisture. Handle only with HF-resistant equipment and PPE, including gloves, face shield, and apron; calcium gluconate gel must be available on-site.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in acid-resistant HDPE drums or plastic-lined steel containers. Store in ventilated, cool areas isolated from bases and oxidizers. Keep containers tightly closed and dry.

name: Zinc Chloride
description: Zinc chloride (ZnCl₂) is a white to colorless hygroscopic solid highly soluble in water and alcohol. It is a strong Lewis acid and an efficient catalyst in many organic transformations.
physicalProperties: Zinc chloride (ZnCl₂) is a white to colorless hygroscopic solid highly soluble in water and alcohol. It is a strong Lewis acid and an efficient catalyst in many organic transformations.
safetyHandling: Corrosive and harmful by ingestion or inhalation. Avoid contact with metals, moisture, and oxidizers. Use in closed systems with PPE.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 25 kg PE-lined drums or 200 kg containers. Store tightly closed in dry conditions, away from acids and bases.

name: Zinc Oxide
description: Zinc oxide (ZnO) is a white, amphoteric powder exhibiting UV absorption, thermal stability, and antimicrobial activity. It can be produced via direct (French) or indirect (American) processes.
physicalProperties: Zinc oxide (ZnO) is a white, amphoteric powder exhibiting UV absorption, thermal stability, and antimicrobial activity. It can be produced via direct (French) or indirect (American) processes.
safetyHandling: Low toxicity but may cause irritation via inhalation. Avoid high-temperature exposure to prevent fume generation.
tradeRegulatory: Delivered in 25–50 kg bags or FIBCs. Store cool, dry, and sealed to prevent moisture absorption.

name: Zinc Citrate
description: Zinc citrate (C₁₂H₁₀O₁₄Zn₃) is a white, odorless powder formed from citric acid and zinc salts. It is highly stable and exhibits antimicrobial and deodorizing properties.
physicalProperties: Zinc citrate (C₁₂H₁₀O₁₄Zn₃) is a white, odorless powder formed from citric acid and zinc salts. It is highly stable and exhibits antimicrobial and deodorizing properties.
safetyHandling: Non-toxic within regulatory limits. Avoid dust inhalation and store dry to maintain stability.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 25 kg fiber drums or PE-lined bags. Store sealed, cool, and dry to prevent caking.

name: Brilliant Blue
otherNames: Blue 1, Brilliant Blue FCF, Food Blue 2
description: Brilliant Blue FCF (C₃₇H₃₄N₂Na₂O₉S₃) is a synthetic triphenylmethane dye known for its intense blue shade and high solubility in water. It demonstrates excellent color stability under light and heat.
physicalProperties: Brilliant Blue FCF (C₃₇H₃₄N₂Na₂O₉S₃) is a synthetic triphenylmethane dye known for its intense blue shade and high solubility in water. It demonstrates excellent color stability under light and heat.
safetyHandling: Non-toxic at approved use levels. Avoid dust inhalation; handle in ventilated environments to prevent color migration.
tradeRegulatory: Delivered in 25 kg foil-lined paper drums or sealed PE bags. Store cool, dry, and away from direct sunlight.

name: Bromine
description: Bromine (Br₂) is a reddish-brown volatile liquid with a strong odor and high reactivity. It is primarily produced from brine and seawater sources and acts as an intermediate in various brominated compounds.
physicalProperties: Bromine (Br₂) is a reddish-brown volatile liquid with a strong odor and high reactivity. It is primarily produced from brine and seawater sources and acts as an intermediate in various brominated compounds.
safetyHandling: Highly corrosive and toxic. Fumes cause severe respiratory and eye irritation. Use only in closed systems with corrosion-resistant materials and emergency ventilation.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 50–250 kg nickel-lined steel cylinders. Store cool, shaded, and isolated in corrosion-proof containment areas.

name: Butyl Acetate
description: Butyl acetate (C₆H₁₂O₂) is a clear, flammable ester solvent with a fruity odor. It offers excellent solvency for resins, polymers, and coatings, evaporating at a moderate rate.
physicalProperties: Butyl acetate (C₆H₁₂O₂) is a clear, flammable ester solvent with a fruity odor. It offers excellent solvency for resins, polymers, and coatings, evaporating at a moderate rate.
safetyHandling: Highly flammable; vapors may form explosive mixtures with air. Prolonged exposure can cause dizziness. Handle with adequate ventilation and antistatic precautions.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 180–200 kg steel drums or ISO tanks. Store in cool, ventilated areas away from heat and ignition sources.

name: Butyl Diglycol Acetate
otherNames: BDGA, Diethylene Glycol Monobutyl Ether, Butyl Carbitol
description: Butyl diglycol acetate (C₁₀H₂₀O₄) is a high-boiling ester solvent with low volatility and mild odor. It provides excellent coalescing and flow properties in coating systems.
physicalProperties: Butyl diglycol acetate (C₁₀H₂₀O₄) is a high-boiling ester solvent with low volatility and mild odor. It provides excellent coalescing and flow properties in coating systems.
safetyHandling: Low toxicity but prolonged contact can cause mild irritation. Avoid heating above flash point and ensure local exhaust ventilation.
tradeRegulatory: Delivered in 200 kg drums or IBC tanks. Store sealed, cool, and away from oxidizing agents.

name: Butyl Glycol
otherNames: 2-Butoxyethanol, Ethylene Glycol Monobutyl Ether, Butyl Cellosolve
description: Butyl glycol (C₆H₁₄O₂) is a clear liquid glycol ether known for its excellent solvency and miscibility with water and organic solvents.
physicalProperties: Butyl glycol (C₆H₁₄O₂) is a clear liquid glycol ether known for its excellent solvency and miscibility with water and organic solvents.
safetyHandling: Moderate toxicity; prolonged skin contact may cause irritation. Use gloves and avoid breathing vapor. Provide mechanical ventilation.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 200 kg drums or bulk tankers. Store in ventilated, cool environments away from acids and oxidizers.

name: Butyl Hydroxy Anisole (BHA)
description: E320 Butyl hydroxyanisole (C₁₁H₁₆O₂) is a phenolic antioxidant used to prevent lipid oxidation in foods, cosmetics, and pharmaceuticals. It stabilizes fats and oils against rancidity.
physicalProperties: E320 Butyl hydroxyanisole (C₁₁H₁₆O₂) is a phenolic antioxidant used to prevent lipid oxidation in foods, cosmetics, and pharmaceuticals. It stabilizes fats and oils against rancidity.
safetyHandling: Recognized as safe in regulated concentrations. Avoid dust inhalation and direct sunlight to prevent degradation.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 25 kg fiber drums or foil-lined bags. Store in cool, dry, and dark areas to maintain antioxidant activity.

name: Butyl Hydroxy Toluene (BHT)
description: Butyl hydroxytoluene (C₁₅H₂₄O) is a synthetic antioxidant that protects organic compounds against oxidative degradation. It appears as white crystalline flakes with high stability.
physicalProperties: Butyl hydroxytoluene (C₁₅H₂₄O) is a synthetic antioxidant that protects organic compounds against oxidative degradation. It appears as white crystalline flakes with high stability.
safetyHandling: Low acute toxicity; avoid inhalation of dust and prolonged skin contact. Use gloves and store under inert, cool conditions.
tradeRegulatory: Delivered in 25 kg aluminum-lined fiber drums or kraft bags. Store tightly closed, away from light and strong oxidants.

name: Carmoisine Red
description: Carmoisine red, or azorubine, is a red powder with formula C20H12N2Na2O7S2 and molecular weight 502.44 g/mol. Soluble in water, used as synthetic azo dye; E122 in food.
physicalProperties: Carmoisine red, or azorubine, is a red powder with formula C20H12N2Na2O7S2 and molecular weight 502.44 g/mol. Soluble in water, used as synthetic azo dye; E122 in food.
safetyHandling: May cause hyperactivity in children; irritant to eyes and skin. Stable; use PPE; no major risks but avoid in sensitive individuals with asthma.
tradeRegulatory: Packaged in 25kg cartons with inner bags; store in dry, cool places per general dye SDS.

name: Zinc Acetate
description: Zinc acetate is a white powder with formula Zn(C2H3O2)2 and molecular weight 183.48 g/mol (anhydrous). Density 1.74 g/cm³, melting point 237°C, soluble in water (430 g/L); used as zinc source.
physicalProperties: Zinc acetate is a white powder with formula Zn(C2H3O2)2 and molecular weight 183.48 g/mol (anhydrous). Density 1.74 g/cm³, melting point 237°C, soluble in water (430 g/L); used as zinc source.
safetyHandling: Irritant to eyes/skin; toxic in high doses causing nausea. Avoid inhalation; stable. Use PPE; monitor for copper deficiency in long-term use.
tradeRegulatory: Packaged in 25kg multi-wall paper bags; store in dry areas per ChemicalBook MSDS.

name: Zinc Dimethyldithiocarbamate
description: Zinc dimethyldithiocarbamate (C₆H₁₂N₂S₄Zn) is a white to light-gray powder used as a fast accelerator in rubber vulcanization. It provides rapid curing and excellent heat aging resistance.
physicalProperties: Zinc dimethyldithiocarbamate (C₆H₁₂N₂S₄Zn) is a white to light-gray powder used as a fast accelerator in rubber vulcanization. It provides rapid curing and excellent heat aging resistance.
safetyHandling: Toxic if ingested and may cause skin sensitization. Avoid dust formation and provide adequate ventilation. Use gloves and protective eyewear.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 25 kg PE-lined paper bags or drums. Store cool, dry, and away from acids and oxidizers to prevent decomposition.

name: Caustic Soda Beads
description: Caustic soda beads (NaOH) are solid, hygroscopic pellets of sodium hydroxide with strong alkalinity. They dissolve exothermically in water to form highly caustic solutions used in numerous industries.
physicalProperties: Caustic soda beads (NaOH) are solid, hygroscopic pellets of sodium hydroxide with strong alkalinity. They dissolve exothermically in water to form highly caustic solutions used in numerous industries.
safetyHandling: Corrosive to all tissues; causes severe burns on contact. Use full PPE and face protection. Avoid contact with acids, metals, and moisture.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 25–50 kg HDPE-lined bags or drums. Store in dry, sealed conditions with segregation from acids and organic materials.

name: Borax
description: Borax (sodium tetraborate decahydrate, Na₂B₄O₇·10H₂O) is a white crystalline mineral used as a buffering, fluxing, and cleansing agent. It provides mild alkalinity and excellent solubility in water, forming part of the borate family of compounds.
physicalProperties: Borax (sodium tetraborate decahydrate, Na₂B₄O₇·10H₂O) is a white crystalline mineral used as a buffering, fluxing, and cleansing agent. It provides mild alkalinity and excellent solubility in water, forming part of the borate family of compounds.
safetyHandling: Low acute toxicity but prolonged exposure can cause skin or eye irritation. Avoid inhalation of dust. Environmental discharge should be minimized due to aquatic sensitivity.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 25–50 kg polyethylene-lined paper bags or bulk big bags. Store sealed, cool, and dry to prevent moisture absorption and caking.

name: Boric Acid
description: Boric acid (H₃BO₃) is a white crystalline solid with mild antiseptic and buffering properties. It dissolves moderately in water and glycerol, forming weakly acidic solutions.
physicalProperties: Boric acid (H₃BO₃) is a white crystalline solid with mild antiseptic and buffering properties. It dissolves moderately in water and glycerol, forming weakly acidic solutions.
safetyHandling: Low toxicity but prolonged exposure should be avoided. Inhalation of dust may cause respiratory irritation. Handle with gloves and eye protection.
tradeRegulatory: Delivered in 25 kg PE-lined kraft bags or drums. Store in a cool, dry place away from strong bases and oxidizing agents.

name: Brilliant Black
description: Brilliant Black (E151) is a synthetic azo dye producing deep black coloration in aqueous solutions. It is highly stable to light, heat, and acidic conditions, making it suitable for industrial and food applications.
physicalProperties: Brilliant Black (E151) is a synthetic azo dye producing deep black coloration in aqueous solutions. It is highly stable to light, heat, and acidic conditions, making it suitable for industrial and food applications.
safetyHandling: Approved within regulated limits for food and cosmetic use. Avoid inhalation of fine powder and contact with oxidizers.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 25 kg fiber drums or foil-lined bags. Store sealed, cool, and dry to prevent clumping and fading.

name: Aziridine
description: Aziridine (C₂H₅N) is a strained, reactive heterocycle widely used as an intermediate in specialty chemical synthesis. Its ring strain makes it an effective alkylating agent for polymer and crosslinking reactions.
physicalProperties: Aziridine (C₂H₅N) is a strained, reactive heterocycle widely used as an intermediate in specialty chemical synthesis. Its ring strain makes it an effective alkylating agent for polymer and crosslinking reactions.
safetyHandling: Highly reactive, toxic, and potentially carcinogenic. Handling requires closed systems, explosion-proof ventilation, and full PPE. Avoid moisture and heat sources.
tradeRegulatory: Typically supplied in small stabilized drums or ampoules under inert gas. Store in cool, dry areas with strict containment controls.

name: Copper Sulfate
description: Copper sulfate pentahydrate (CuSO₄·5H₂O) is a blue crystalline compound with biocidal and catalytic properties. It dissolves easily in water to release copper ions.
physicalProperties: Copper sulfate pentahydrate (CuSO₄·5H₂O) is a blue crystalline compound with biocidal and catalytic properties. It dissolves easily in water to release copper ions.
safetyHandling: Harmful if swallowed and toxic to aquatic organisms. Use PPE and avoid environmental release.
tradeRegulatory: 25–50 kg polyethylene-lined bags. Store dry and segregated from reducing agents.

name: Barium Carbonate
description: Barium carbonate (BaCO₃) is a white powder used as a flux, chemical intermediate, and pigment component. It is insoluble in water but reactive in acidic environments.
physicalProperties: Barium carbonate (BaCO₃) is a white powder used as a flux, chemical intermediate, and pigment component. It is insoluble in water but reactive in acidic environments.
safetyHandling: Toxic if ingested or inhaled; handle with gloves and avoid dust formation. Keep away from acids.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 25–50 kg multiwall bags or FIBCs. Store in cool, dry, ventilated locations.

name: Barium Chloride
description: Barium chloride dihydrate (BaCl₂·2H₂O) is a water-soluble salt used as a source of barium ions. It appears as colorless crystals with high hygroscopicity.
physicalProperties: Barium chloride dihydrate (BaCl₂·2H₂O) is a water-soluble salt used as a source of barium ions. It appears as colorless crystals with high hygroscopicity.
safetyHandling: Highly toxic if ingested; may cause severe irritation on contact. Avoid dust and handle in ventilated environments.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 25 kg plastic-lined bags or drums. Store sealed, cool, and dry, away from acids and moisture.

name: Barium Nitrate
description: Barium nitrate (Ba(NO₃)₂) is a white crystalline oxidizing salt known for its strong oxygen-releasing capacity and high thermal stability. It decomposes upon heating, liberating oxygen and barium oxide, which makes it valuable in pyrotechnic and combustion systems.
physicalProperties: Barium nitrate (Ba(NO₃)₂) is a white crystalline oxidizing salt known for its strong oxygen-releasing capacity and high thermal stability. It decomposes upon heating, liberating oxygen and barium oxide, which makes it valuable in pyrotechnic and combustion systems.
safetyHandling: An oxidizing agent that enhances combustion; avoid mixing with organics or reducing materials. Toxic if ingested and irritating to skin and eyes. Use explosion-proof ventilation and anti-static measures.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 25–50 kg polyethylene-lined kraft bags or fiber drums. Store in a cool, dry area away from heat, fuels, and incompatible substances.

name: Barium Sulfate
description: Barium sulfate (BaSO₄) is an inert, white crystalline powder with extremely low solubility in water and acids. Its high density, opacity, and chemical inertness make it a preferred filler and pigment extender.
physicalProperties: Barium sulfate (BaSO₄) is an inert, white crystalline powder with extremely low solubility in water and acids. Its high density, opacity, and chemical inertness make it a preferred filler and pigment extender.
safetyHandling: Non-toxic and chemically stable; however, fine dust may cause mechanical irritation. Avoid inhalation and excessive dust generation.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 25–50 kg paper bags with PE liners or big bags. Store sealed, dry, and free from contamination to maintain whiteness and flowability.

name: Barium Titanate
otherNames: Barium Metatitanate, Barium Titanium Oxide, BTO
description: Barium titanate (BaTiO₃) is a ferroelectric ceramic material known for its high dielectric constant and piezoelectric properties. It appears as an off-white powder or fine granule used in advanced electronic applications.
physicalProperties: Barium titanate (BaTiO₃) is a ferroelectric ceramic material known for its high dielectric constant and piezoelectric properties. It appears as an off-white powder or fine granule used in advanced electronic applications.
safetyHandling: Chemically stable but may generate fine particulate dust; wear respiratory protection when handling. Avoid contamination with organics or moisture that can affect dielectric behavior.
tradeRegulatory: Delivered in 10–25 kg sealed fiber drums or antistatic PE-lined containers. Store dry, cool, and protected from vibration and humidity.

name: Benzyl Alcohol
description: Benzyl alcohol (C₆H₅CH₂OH) is a colorless, low-volatility liquid with a mild aromatic odor. It serves as both a solvent and preservative in industrial and pharmaceutical formulations.
physicalProperties: Benzyl alcohol (C₆H₅CH₂OH) is a colorless, low-volatility liquid with a mild aromatic odor. It serves as both a solvent and preservative in industrial and pharmaceutical formulations.
safetyHandling: Low acute toxicity but may cause mild irritation. Avoid heating above 90 °C in confined spaces. Use gloves and safety goggles during handling.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 200 kg drums or IBC tanks. Store sealed, away from strong oxidizers, in cool, ventilated storage areas.

name: Benzyl Benzoate
description: Benzyl benzoate (C₁₄H₁₂O₂) is an ester of benzyl alcohol and benzoic acid used as a solvent, fixative, and pharmaceutical ingredient. It is a clear, slightly viscous liquid with a faint aromatic odor.
physicalProperties: Benzyl benzoate (C₁₄H₁₂O₂) is an ester of benzyl alcohol and benzoic acid used as a solvent, fixative, and pharmaceutical ingredient. It is a clear, slightly viscous liquid with a faint aromatic odor.
safetyHandling: Low toxicity but may cause mild skin irritation. Handle with gloves and avoid prolonged exposure to heat and light.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 200 kg HDPE or steel drums. Store tightly closed in cool, dry, well-ventilated areas away from oxidizing agents.

name: Benzoic Acid
otherNames: Benzene Carboxylic Acid, Phenyl Carboxylic Acid, Carboxybenzene
description: Benzoic acid (C₆H₅COOH) is a white crystalline aromatic carboxylic acid with mild antiseptic properties and excellent stability. It serves as a preservative, intermediate, and corrosion inhibitor.
physicalProperties: Benzoic acid (C₆H₅COOH) is a white crystalline aromatic carboxylic acid with mild antiseptic properties and excellent stability. It serves as a preservative, intermediate, and corrosion inhibitor.
safetyHandling: Low toxicity but may irritate skin and eyes. Avoid dust formation and store away from oxidizing agents.
tradeRegulatory: Delivered in 25 kg polyethylene-lined bags or fiber drums. Store sealed, cool, and dry to prevent caking and sublimation.

name: Benzotriazole
description: Benzotriazole (C₆H₅N₃) is a heterocyclic corrosion inhibitor and UV stabilizer known for forming protective films on metal surfaces. It is compatible with copper, aluminum, and multimetal systems.
physicalProperties: Benzotriazole (C₆H₅N₃) is a heterocyclic corrosion inhibitor and UV stabilizer known for forming protective films on metal surfaces. It is compatible with copper, aluminum, and multimetal systems.
safetyHandling: Stable and low in volatility; may cause mild irritation to eyes or skin. Avoid dust inhalation and contact with strong oxidizers.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 25 kg fiber drums or PE-lined bags. Store in cool, dry conditions away from direct sunlight.

name: Beta Carotene
description: Beta carotene (C₄₀H₅₆) is a carotenoid pigment functioning as a natural provitamin A source and antioxidant. It imparts yellow to orange coloration and exhibits strong oxidative stability when properly protected.
physicalProperties: Beta carotene (C₄₀H₅₆) is a carotenoid pigment functioning as a natural provitamin A source and antioxidant. It imparts yellow to orange coloration and exhibits strong oxidative stability when properly protected.
safetyHandling: Non-toxic at normal consumption levels. Sensitive to oxidation; handle under nitrogen or with antioxidants.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied as beadlets, powders, or emulsions in nitrogen-flushed containers. Store cool, dark, and dry to preserve color and potency.

name: Betaine
description: Betaine (C₅H₁₁NO₂), also known as trimethylglycine, is a naturally occurring amino acid derivative acting as an osmolyte and methyl donor. It improves hydration and cellular protection under stress conditions.
physicalProperties: Betaine (C₅H₁₁NO₂), also known as trimethylglycine, is a naturally occurring amino acid derivative acting as an osmolyte and methyl donor. It improves hydration and cellular protection under stress conditions.
safetyHandling: Low hazard profile; avoid moisture and microbial contamination. Handle with standard hygiene precautions.
tradeRegulatory: Delivered in 25 kg bags or fiber drums. Store cool, dry, and sealed against humidity.

name: Acetone
description: Acetone (C₃H₆O) is a highly volatile, low-boiling solvent with strong polarity and fast evaporation rate. It is miscible with water and most organic solvents.
physicalProperties: Acetone (C₃H₆O) is a highly volatile, low-boiling solvent with strong polarity and fast evaporation rate. It is miscible with water and most organic solvents.
safetyHandling: Highly flammable; vapors form explosive mixtures with air. Avoid static discharge and use explosion-proof ventilation. May cause transient drowsiness on exposure.
tradeRegulatory: Delivered in steel drums, IBCs, or bulk tankers; store in cool, ventilated, fire-safe locations.

name: Vitamin C Ascorbic Acid
description: Vitamin C is a well-known anti-oxidant. Its effect on free-radical formation when topically applied to the skin by means of a cream has not been clear. L-Ascorbic acid (Vitamin C) is a water soluble molecule used in a wide variety of applications, including cell culture, as a reducing agent that helps.
physicalProperties: Vitamin C is a well-known anti-oxidant. Its effect on free-radical formation when topically applied to the skin by means of a cream has not been clear. L-Ascorbic acid (Vitamin C) is a water soluble molecule used in a wide variety of applications, including cell culture, as a reducing agent that helps.
safetyHandling: Precautionary P210 keep from heat, P305+P351+P338 if in eyes rinse; low toxicity but irritant; stable but light-sensitive; use protective gear.
tradeRegulatory: Leave in original containers; no mixing with waste; handle uncleaned like product.

name: Aspartame
description: Aspartame (C₁₄H₁₈N₂O₅) is a dipeptide sweetener composed of L-aspartic acid and L-phenylalanine methyl ester. It offers sweetness approximately 200 times greater than sucrose.
physicalProperties: Aspartame (C₁₄H₁₈N₂O₅) is a dipeptide sweetener composed of L-aspartic acid and L-phenylalanine methyl ester. It offers sweetness approximately 200 times greater than sucrose.
safetyHandling: Safe within established ADI limits; unsuitable for individuals with phenylketonuria. Avoid excessive heat and moisture to prevent degradation.
tradeRegulatory: Foil-lined bags or fiber drums with desiccants; store cool, dry, and sealed from air exposure.

name: Astaxanthin
description: Astaxanthin (C₄₀H₅₂O₄) is a red-orange xanthophyll carotenoid known for its potent antioxidant and pigmentation properties. Naturally sourced from microalgae Haematococcus pluvialis, it is available in natural and synthetic forms for industrial applications.
physicalProperties: Astaxanthin (C₄₀H₅₂O₄) is a red-orange xanthophyll carotenoid known for its potent antioxidant and pigmentation properties. Naturally sourced from microalgae Haematococcus pluvialis, it is available in natural and synthetic forms for industrial applications.
safetyHandling: Non-toxic at recommended use levels but highly sensitive to heat, oxygen, and light; proper stabilization is essential. Handle powders with care to avoid inhalation.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied as oleoresin, beadlets, or powders in nitrogen-flushed, light-protected containers. Store refrigerated and sealed to maintain potency.

name: Aluminum Nitrate
description: Aluminum nitrate nonahydrate [Al(NO₃)₃·9H₂O] is a deliquescent, water-soluble oxidizing salt that provides a controlled source of aluminum ions. It appears as colorless crystals with strong hygroscopicity and is widely used in catalysis and materials chemistry.
physicalProperties: Aluminum nitrate nonahydrate [Al(NO₃)₃·9H₂O] is a deliquescent, water-soluble oxidizing salt that provides a controlled source of aluminum ions. It appears as colorless crystals with strong hygroscopicity and is widely used in catalysis and materials chemistry.
safetyHandling: An oxidizer that may intensify combustion in contact with organic matter. Irritating to eyes and skin; use chemical-resistant gloves, goggles, and avoid contact with combustibles.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in HDPE-lined drums or bags. Store in a cool, dry area away from reducing agents and flammable materials, ensuring moisture protection.

name: Ammonium Sulfate
description: Ammonium sulfate is a white crystalline inorganic salt widely used in agriculture and industry. It provides a reliable source of nitrogen and sulfur and is valued for its stability, high purity and ease of handling in large scale operations.
physicalProperties: Ammonium sulfate is a white crystalline inorganic salt widely used in agriculture and industry. It provides a reliable source of nitrogen and sulfur and is valued for its stability, high purity and ease of handling in large scale operations.
safetyHandling: Low toxicity but dust may irritate eyes and respiratory system. Use PPE and good ventilation during handling.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 25 kilogram bags or bulk big bags. Store in dry conditions to prevent caking.

name: Antimony Trioxide
description: Antimony trioxide (Sb₂O₃) is a fine white crystalline powder primarily used as a flame-retardant synergist. It functions as a key additive in polymeric systems requiring enhanced fire resistance and thermal stability.
physicalProperties: Antimony trioxide (Sb₂O₃) is a fine white crystalline powder primarily used as a flame-retardant synergist. It functions as a key additive in polymeric systems requiring enhanced fire resistance and thermal stability.
safetyHandling: Inhalation of dust may cause irritation and chronic exposure effects; process enclosures and local exhaust are essential. Avoid generation of airborne dust and contact with acids that may produce toxic fumes.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 25 kg multiwall bags or FIBCs with moisture barriers. Store sealed in a dry, ventilated environment away from heat and incompatible substances.

name: Ammonium Molybdate
description: Ammonium molybdate tetrahydrate [(NH₄)₆Mo₇O₂₄·4H₂O] is a water-soluble molybdenum compound used in catalysts, coatings, and corrosion control systems.
physicalProperties: Ammonium molybdate tetrahydrate [(NH₄)₆Mo₇O₂₄·4H₂O] is a water-soluble molybdenum compound used in catalysts, coatings, and corrosion control systems.
safetyHandling: Low acute toxicity but may cause irritation on prolonged contact. Avoid dust generation and direct skin exposure. Prevent discharge to waterways due to metal ion content.
tradeRegulatory: 25 kg polyethylene-lined bags or fiber drums. Store dry and tightly closed to prevent moisture absorption and caking.

name: Ammonium Chloride
description: Ammonium chloride (NH₄Cl) is a white crystalline salt produced as a by-product of the Solvay process. It provides both ammonium and chloride ions, making it valuable in metal treatment and buffer systems.
physicalProperties: Ammonium chloride (NH₄Cl) is a white crystalline salt produced as a by-product of the Solvay process. It provides both ammonium and chloride ions, making it valuable in metal treatment and buffer systems.
safetyHandling: Irritating to eyes, skin, and respiratory tract; handle with ventilation and PPE. Avoid mixing with strong bases to prevent ammonia release.
tradeRegulatory: 25 kg plastic-lined kraft bags or bulk sacks; store in cool, dry areas to avoid moisture uptake.

name: Sodium Bicarbonate
description: Sodium Bicarbonate, NaHCO3, is a white monoclinic crystalline powder or granules, soluble (9 g/100 mL at 20°C) with effervescent CO2 release in acids, mined or Solvay-processed for buffering and leavening per PubChem industrial uses.
physicalProperties: Sodium Bicarbonate, NaHCO3, is a white monoclinic crystalline powder or granules, soluble (9 g/100 mL at 20°C) with effervescent CO2 release in acids, mined or Solvay-processed for buffering and leavening per PubChem industrial uses.
safetyHandling: Systemic alkalosis from overuse; dust explosive in confined spaces. Inhalation irritant; deploy antistatic measures and use bicarbonate-compatible respirators in silos.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 50 kg laminated polypropylene supersacks. Bulk in dry bulk terminals with pneumatic unloading.

name: Acesulfame K
description: Acesulfame potassium (C₄H₄KNO₄S) is a high-intensity, non-nutritive sweetener offering clean taste and excellent heat stability.
physicalProperties: Acesulfame potassium (C₄H₄KNO₄S) is a high-intensity, non-nutritive sweetener offering clean taste and excellent heat stability.
safetyHandling: Non-carcinogenic and stable under processing temperatures. Dust may irritate mucous membranes; use PPE and maintain dry storage conditions.
tradeRegulatory: 20–25 kg cartons or drums with moisture-resistant liners; store in a cool, dry environment protected from light.

name: Acetaldehyde
description: Acetaldehyde (CH₃CHO) is a volatile, colorless liquid with a sharp odor and high reactivity. It serves as an intermediate in chemical synthesis and industrial oxidation processes.
physicalProperties: Acetaldehyde (CH₃CHO) is a volatile, colorless liquid with a sharp odor and high reactivity. It serves as an intermediate in chemical synthesis and industrial oxidation processes.
safetyHandling: Highly flammable and irritant; harmful by inhalation and classified as a potential carcinogen. Handle in explosion-proof systems under inert gas.
tradeRegulatory: Delivered in stabilized form within stainless steel or aluminum drums under nitrogen. Store refrigerated in well-ventilated flammable liquid storage areas.

name: Acetic Anhydride
description: Acetic anhydride [(CH₃CO)₂O] is a reactive acetylating agent and important industrial intermediate. It is a colorless liquid with a pungent odor and strong dehydrating properties.
physicalProperties: Acetic anhydride [(CH₃CO)₂O] is a reactive acetylating agent and important industrial intermediate. It is a colorless liquid with a pungent odor and strong dehydrating properties.
safetyHandling: Corrosive and reacts violently with water, alcohols, and bases; release of acetic acid vapors can cause irritation. Ensure dry, closed systems and fume extraction.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in inhibited form within steel drums or ISO tanks under nitrogen. Store below 30 °C away from heat and moisture.

name: Acetic Acid
description: Acetic acid (CH₃COOH), also known as glacial acetic acid in concentrated form, is a fundamental organic acid used throughout chemical industries.
physicalProperties: Acetic acid (CH₃COOH), also known as glacial acetic acid in concentrated form, is a fundamental organic acid used throughout chemical industries.
safetyHandling: Corrosive and volatile at high concentrations; vapors may irritate eyes and airways. Handle in corrosion-resistant equipment with ventilation.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in HDPE drums, IBCs, or bulk tanks. Store in cool, dry areas away from oxidizing agents.

name: 1-Bromo 3-Chloropropane
description: 1-Bromo-3-chloropropane is a colorless liquid with formula C3H6BrCl and molecular weight 157.44 g/mol. Density 1.59 g/cm³, boiling point 143°C, melting point -59°C, flash point 60°C; insoluble in water, soluble in organics; halogenated alkane, used in synthesis.
physicalProperties: 1-Bromo-3-chloropropane is a colorless liquid with formula C3H6BrCl and molecular weight 157.44 g/mol. Density 1.59 g/cm³, boiling point 143°C, melting point -59°C, flash point 60°C; insoluble in water, soluble in organics; halogenated alkane, used in synthesis.
safetyHandling: Toxic by inhalation, ingestion, skin absorption; irritates eyes/respiratory. Combustible; avoid oxidizers. Stable; use PPE, ventilate; monitor for chronic toxicity.
tradeRegulatory: Packaged in 250ml or 1L glass bottles; store in cool, ventilated places per Sigma-Aldrich catalog.

name: 2-Ethylhexanol
description: 2-Ethylhexanol is a clear colourless liquid alcohol produced through controlled chemical synthesis for industrial use. It has a mild characteristic odour and offers good solvency, stability and compatibility with a wide range of chemical systems. The product is widely used as an intermediate where consistent quality, purity and supply reliability are required for downstream manufacturing.
physicalProperties: 2-Ethylhexanol is a clear colourless liquid alcohol produced through controlled chemical synthesis for industrial use. It has a mild characteristic odour and offers good solvency, stability and compatibility with a wide range of chemical systems. The product is widely used as an intermediate where consistent quality, purity and supply reliability are required for downstream manufacturing.
safetyHandling: Irritant to skin, eyes and respiratory system. Vapours may cause discomfort in poorly ventilated areas. Use appropriate PPE and local exhaust ventilation. Avoid prolonged exposure and contact with oxidising agents.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 170 kilogram steel drums, IBC containers or bulk tankers.

name: 4-Hydroxy-TEMPO
description: 4-Hydroxy-TEMPO is a stable nitroxyl radical supplied as an orange to red crystalline solid with high purity and consistent performance. It is widely used in chemical manufacturing and research environments where controlled radical activity and oxidation stability are required. The material offers reliable handling characteristics and long shelf life under proper storage conditions.
physicalProperties: 4-Hydroxy-TEMPO is a stable nitroxyl radical supplied as an orange to red crystalline solid with high purity and consistent performance. It is widely used in chemical manufacturing and research environments where controlled radical activity and oxidation stability are required. The material offers reliable handling characteristics and long shelf life under proper storage conditions.
safetyHandling: Irritant to skin, eyes and respiratory system. Avoid inhalation of dust and prolonged contact. Handle with appropriate PPE and adequate ventilation. Stable under normal conditions but should be kept away from strong reducing agents.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 1 kilogram, 5 kilogram or 25 kilogram HDPE containers or fibre drums with inner liners. Store in a cool and dry place protected from light in accordance with SDS recommendations.

name: Adipic Acid
description: Adipic acid (C₆H₁₀O₄) is an industrial dicarboxylic acid appearing as a white crystalline solid. It serves as one of the most important monomers in polymer chemistry, especially in nylon 6,6 synthesis. Owing to its consistent purity, low moisture absorption, and good handling stability, it is also favored as an intermediate for high-performance materials.
physicalProperties: Adipic acid (C₆H₁₀O₄) is an industrial dicarboxylic acid appearing as a white crystalline solid. It serves as one of the most important monomers in polymer chemistry, especially in nylon 6,6 synthesis. Owing to its consistent purity, low moisture absorption, and good handling stability, it is also favored as an intermediate for high-performance materials.
safetyHandling: Mildly irritating to eyes and skin in dust form. Handle in well-ventilated areas and avoid static accumulation. Store away from bases and oxidizers.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied as prills or crystalline powder in 25 kg bags or FIBCs; maintain cool, dry conditions to prevent caking.

name: Aerosil 200
description: Aerosil 200 is a high-purity, amorphous fumed silica manufactured by flame hydrolysis of silicon tetrachloride. It has a specific surface area of approximately 200 m²/g and provides exceptional thickening, anti-settling, and flow-enhancing properties across a wide range of formulations.
physicalProperties: Aerosil 200 is a high-purity, amorphous fumed silica manufactured by flame hydrolysis of silicon tetrachloride. It has a specific surface area of approximately 200 m²/g and provides exceptional thickening, anti-settling, and flow-enhancing properties across a wide range of formulations.
safetyHandling: Inhalation of airborne dust can cause respiratory irritation. Implement local exhaust ventilation and wear suitable respiratory protection. Avoid prolonged exposure to moisture, which reduces product performance.
tradeRegulatory: Available in 10–20 kg multi-wall paper bags or FIBCs lined with PE; stored in dry, closed areas to prevent contamination.

name: Acrylic Acid
description: Acrylic acid (C₃H₄O₂) is a reactive, colorless liquid monomer characterized by its pungent odor and high polymerization potential. It is primarily used in the manufacture of acrylate polymers and copolymers with applications requiring flexibility, adhesion, and water resistance.
physicalProperties: Acrylic acid (C₃H₄O₂) is a reactive, colorless liquid monomer characterized by its pungent odor and high polymerization potential. It is primarily used in the manufacture of acrylate polymers and copolymers with applications requiring flexibility, adhesion, and water resistance.
safetyHandling: Corrosive and prone to spontaneous polymerization under heat or contamination. Maintain inhibitor levels, ensure inert gas blanketing, and avoid contact with oxidizers or bases. Adequate ventilation and PPE are mandatory during handling.
tradeRegulatory: Stabilized product supplied in lined steel drums, IBCs, or ISO tanks under nitrogen. Store below 25 °C in dry, ventilated conditions away from light and ignition sources.

name: Formaldehyde
description: Formaldehyde is a colourless aqueous solution or gas widely used as a key industrial chemical and intermediate. It is valued for its strong reactivity, preservative properties and reliability in large scale chemical manufacturing and processing.
physicalProperties: Formaldehyde is a colourless aqueous solution or gas widely used as a key industrial chemical and intermediate. It is valued for its strong reactivity, preservative properties and reliability in large scale chemical manufacturing and processing.
safetyHandling: Highly toxic and corrosive. Causes severe irritation to skin, eyes and respiratory system. Classified as a carcinogenic substance. Strict PPE, ventilation and exposure controls are required. Handle only in approved facilities following regulatory guidelines.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied as aqueous solution in 200 kilogram drums, IBC containers or bulk tankers. Store in cool and well ventilated areas away from ignition sources.

name: Activated Carbon
description: Activated carbon is a high-surface-area adsorbent produced from coconut shell, coal, or wood through steam or chemical activation. Its microporous structure enables efficient removal of organics, chlorine, and other impurities from gases and liquids.
physicalProperties: Activated carbon is a high-surface-area adsorbent produced from coconut shell, coal, or wood through steam or chemical activation. Its microporous structure enables efficient removal of organics, chlorine, and other impurities from gases and liquids.
safetyHandling: Fine carbon dust is combustible; avoid sparks and open flames. Inhalation of dust can irritate respiratory passages. Ensure process ventilation and proper grounding of handling equipment.
tradeRegulatory: Supplied in 20–25 kg polyethylene-lined kraft bags or FIBCs. Store in cool, dry, and well-ventilated areas; protect from moisture to maintain adsorption efficiency.
